user_comment: Very impressed, LOVE it!!! So we’re actually having a small ceremonial reception so I thought I’d go for something shorter and more low key. I thought I’d just try this one on for fun. I honestly got it with the expectation of returning it, but when I put it on I didn’t want to take it off. I may have had it on for about an hour lol. I was also looking for something to hide my mom tummy and almost didn’t think it was possible. The corset really works wonders. You will only need someone to help with lacing it for you. Oh and for me the bonus is that I won’t even need to do a wardrobe change for dancing because the skirt is just hitting the floor. With heels, the length is perfect. For reference, I am 5’7 and 158lbs. I ordered the size 8. No alterations are needed and no bra or shape wear. The padding is very firm. You could add a hoop skirt if you’d like. Needless to say, this dress has really surpassed my expectations. I want to say more but overall, I am very excited for my husband to be to see me in this dress. We just may need to call this a wedding after all!

AMAZING So when I unpacked the item I immediately saw the bright pink color! I panicked because I was expecting a champagne color. I begin the process of the return then something said try it on! OMMMMGGGG! Let me tell you, the dress fits like a glove! I am 5’1 and 115. The chest area was a little small I am a 32DD. I received so many compliments. The product was high quality! I will be ordering from this company again. Please do no panic when you see the color.

Length ideal for someone of avg to not-too-tall. So be prepared to rock some appropriate stilettos. So, I'm 5'3" and newly down in poundage from too many years on Mommy slack. On my terms, I've been losing and rebuilding, so I still need the tiny help of a soft shaper.....SOMA. It is a little long, but I have heels for that and no desire to shorten it.After that?The fabric is A-plus. The I strongly recommend gentle care, and your little $30 will go a long way.I'm an A-cup, emphasized by fat lost to weightlifting, but if you have an experienced seamstress - as I do in my sister(s) - any minor adjustment to the seam in the neck is a breeze. Otherwise, "nice" B-C cups should do just fine and will look good.I'm also 36 around, to help anyone who needs a good comparison for herself, or a man buying for his lady.I'm very picky about dresses and really used to only by occasion dresses. Everything else is pants or shorts. Wear it and wear it well, don't wear it down. Pick your occasions too. It's a really classy dress and worthy of being called an investment.I'll be back for black!!

Great dress at a great price So, I ALWAYS read the reviews when I’m looking for anything on Amazon….. this dress got great reviews and I went with that! Yes, the material was a bit stiff but don’t y’all clean your purchases BEFORE you wear them? I do and it softened the material out! I got it steamed to get rid of the wrinkles and I was good to go! Did I mention I wore it to get married??? I wear a size 10 and I’m 5’8 and it fit me like a glove and I got soooo many compliments on this dress! I think it was a great buy at a great price!! It’s worth it!!

My second of these dresses-great for night out/ traveling So, I bought the olive in small and it fits but is a “tighter” or more fitted version of this dress. But I love the flattering overall shape and ruffle skirting. The material is thinner but also hangs well. Love the sleeves and ease of this dress. Easy elegance, if more fitted or short go regular size, if you want a little room to eat dinner and longer skirt go a size up. For reference I’m 5’3” @130 lbsGood quality for the price! I’m wearing with thigh high boots!

I'm pretty happy with it. So, I decided to be rather picky and take forever choosing my dress for my winter dance. A lot of the dresses i wanted wouldn't arrive on time which is honestly disappointing. I didn't think I could pull off a tighter dress, but God darn! I look so good!!! The back isn't as amazing as the front, but that might just be the shape of my back and stuff. The zipper works good, but it does kinda bunch up a little bit while wearing the dress. It doesn't ruin the look or anything, just kinda made me self conscious while trying it on, but oh well, I can't see it while I'm dancing doesn't matter. 1 thing that did concern me was the way it came. It came pretty fast, like 3 days or something so YAY! but It literally came in like a zip lock bag type thing with a package sticker on it. So it didn't come super packaged which is a little concerning, but it's all good. The sewing by the zipper looks pretty okay, not bad at all, just not the nicest prettiest job. The sleeves are nice, they are long enough and not to tight or loose on the cuff, but definitely slide up when i put my arms up. The dress itself doesnt ride up much unless im like going up stairs. Also, for reference, im around like 5' 3" 5' 5"ish, and around 135 lbs. I got a small, its not to tight, its rather comfy but the sleeves do ride up when my arms go up. I hope my date likes the dress, I do, I recommend it. Also I hope you like my fuzzy nerd socks, it's a little bonus in my review🙃 I love those socks so much!

The Perfect Black Dress So, I needed a black dress for a wedding and this was so perfect. I actually could have ordered my regular size (a large) but I was worried about the amount of stretch so I sized up! It still worked out and didn't look too big on me. I'll definitely be getting more colors! 👌🏽 For reference: Actual Size: 14 (bottom) Tops: Large Bust: 40.5” Waist: 35.5” Hip Measurement: 48.5” Height: 5’3”

Way Better Than Expected! So, I went back to school to complete my diploma, at 40 years old. & We had prom, between working, going to school & having a 5 year old, I didn’t have much time to go out shopping. I found this dress on here & honey it most definitely served it’s purpose!! I had soooo many compliments, I have a lot of booty so it didn’t drape the ground, I’m also very clumsy so the length of it was perfect! I was very pleased. The purse, dress & jewelry all came from Amazon, the shoes were from DSW!

Don't wash, it bleeds! So, I wore this for my bachelorette party and got raving reviews. It fits great- a bit loose in the chest area but I have an hour glass figure (5'7" 166lbs and I ordered a Large...come on ladies, add your weight, height, and size ordered to reviews, it helps!), so the chest area was fine for me. HOWEVER, it bled when I washed it! The green runs and it's noticeable. I emailed the seller and they just said it was an Amazon issue. So, that sucks and I am extremely disappointed. It's not cheap per se and I would have loved to been able to wear it again bc I do love this dress! But they had no remorse when emailed. Buyer beware! It's great if you don't plan on washing it...EVER.

Fits well and appears well made So, I’ve been wearing the same velvet jumpsuit to my husband’s annual company Christmas party for about three years now. I needed a change! I thought this short red velvet dress would be a good choice, and I’m pleased with it. It feels comfortable, not scratchy and even though it says “mini” it’s really not that short (on me anyway - I’m 5’4”). The one sleeve design adds some interest. The fit is a bit generous. I usually size up to M because of how small clothes on Amazon are, but this is a bit loose in the waist. But I figure it’ll be good and not too restrictive. If you want a skin tight fit, size down.

Last minute rescue dress! So, knowing it would only cause stress, I attempted to make my own wedding dress. And I waited until the last minute. When I realized on Sunday that my dress would not make my happy on Friday's wedding, I ordered this and a few other options. I paid for the expedited shipping, but I still didn't have the guarantee that it would make it in time. Not only did it arrive two days early, the fit was perfect, and I just loved it. I have received so many compliments on this dress. Sizing--I'm 5'7", 275 lbs, and I ordered the 26 based on measurements (I normally wear a 22). Do order by measurements, not size. It hit the ground on me, so it might need a hem for someone shorter. It would be an easy hem, though. No advanced sewing skills needed.

It's hits the body in all the right place and hides any unwanted belly! 3. It's long enough! I'm 5'8 and I thought it would be too short, but just like Goldie locks, it fit just right! 4. Easy to wash too. Stick into laundry bag, wash, and your product is just like new again! 5. I got so many compliments as well! Pink is def the move, but other colors are nice as well:) 10/10 would recommend😁

Feels super comfy and it’s flowy. Nice material. Sooo Wow I’m so impressed w this wrap dress. I ordered it on a whim just in case my 1st choice dress didn’t work out. It arrived late- hours before our engagement pics. I wasn’t even planning to wear it or try it on anymore but I loved the color and material when I saw it so I tried it on just because. I fell in love with it and it was this dress I used for our pictures. It’s super comfortable and flowy. It’s not see through and it’s super flattering. I didn’t have time to figure out different ways to use it and like an idiot I didn’t see it came with a tube top! So I struggled to hide the black tube top I wore underneath. I actually don’t like the side pictures we took because you can see the black tube top. Would’ve been great if I would’ve seen it came with one!! Ughhh!!! Anyway dress is awesome. I’m 180lbs and ordered the large. I’m 5’5 and used just a comfy 1inch heel. Dress was floor length for me as you can see in pic. Can’t wait to wear this for something else haha.

Showstopper Sophisticated and tasteful, and very attractive! This dress checks all the boxes. I followed the size chart and it fit perfectly. The only minor complaint I have is that I wish the material was just a tad thicker. I wore shape wear underneath the dress, and you can see the lines of the shape wear through the material. You can also see the lines of my bra. It wasn’t a huge deal for me, but I wish those lines were a little more hidden. Other than that, I really like everything about it. It hugs my body without being too restrictive. The material is soft and pretty lightweight… it was a little wrinkly straight out of the package, but those wrinkles smoothed out when I put it on. The ruching is so pretty! It’s at the right shoulder and the left side of the body, which makes the overall look even more regal. The dress fell a couple inches above my ankles (I’m 5’6”) and it moved very well with me throughout the day when I wore it to work. I absolutely adore the simple design of this dress and highly recommend it. You’ll get a lot of compliments!

Sorry about the white marks, i'm not tryna spread pictures of my people over the internet. This is a great dress, all six bridesmaids used it in my sister's wedding. The material is great, it is a little stretchy and bouncy, but has a good solid feel to it. The weight of the dress is great, it hangs really well. With a pretty good breeze, the dress doesn't billow, only the end of the skirt flows in the wind, so it looks great. You need to wear seamless underwear with it because you can definitely see underwear lines through the material, though it is not super thin material, it is just very form-fitting. Because of the slippery material, after wearing for a while, all of our dresses slipped a little where we tied them, but it was easily fixed and didn't change how i liked the dress. The skirt is very long. I'm 5'8" and bought a medium, i tied the waist just below my breasts and the skirt hung all the way to the floor, almost to the point of dragging. The straps for tying are very long, almost two times longer than the skirt itself, which leaves a lot of room to make sure you can tie it however you want then wrap the straps around yourself or leave them hanging. The bandeau that was sent with the dress is fine. One of the women had to buy another bandeau because the one that was sent with her dress was sewn lopsided and crooked and could not be used. For the rest of us it was just fine. The dress worked for the pregnant woman in our group, because the skirt is long it went over her stomach without affecting the length very much (she was close to her due date, but also she is very slim). The dress worked for the nursing mother in our group, though it would depend how you tie it how much of a hassle it will be. I like the dress a lot, I haven't worn it since the wedding, but I'm sure I could wear it anywhere because it is simple and pretty elegant.

Very sexy Sorry for the poor quality pic, but the dress is nice. It's better quality than I expected, not see through at all. I'm 5'3", around a size 4 usually, 35-28-38 and I ordered a small. It's tight but not too tight, I definitely still have room to eat it and not worry about sitting or moving around. It's not quite as long as other dresses so it's an alright length for me, I might wear a short heel. You can see my orange bra in the pic, so it's a pretty deep v cut in the front. Some of the other reviewers mentioned adding a few stitches in the front, so plan to do that unless you're wearing a matching bra or bikini top or your boobs stand up on their own. I'm a 34dd.

Amazing fit for “plus size” curvy bodies Sorry I do not have a full body picture as that would be more in my review. I am 5’9 and I just had a baby and I have some extra pounds on me. I’m not telling my weight. However this dress was so flattering and fit amazing. I don’t have super big boobs so the top was a little big as I wore an XL.. SUPER COMFORTABLE... I'm Short (5'1") approx 138 lbs....and the SMALL fit great! • I was worried about it touching the ground since I'm so short but it didn't. • The fabric was good quality and a decent thickness. • The white color was a nice warm/neutral white. (no gray in it at all) • My friend also bought the same dress and to be honest it would gracefully fit almost ANY body type (we both want to order in more colors). NOTES: I NEVER order clothes off of Amazon, in fact I think this is my first clothing purchase and I was pleasantly surprised. CONS: The only thing we both didn't love is the bandeau because it bunched up, which was probably intentionally designed that way to accommodate all chest sizes. I tried to not use it, however it was needed to hide my strapless bra. Once the bra was on, everything was smooth. So if you're small chested you may experience the same bunching issues. UPGRADES: We both agreed, if this had pockets it would be fabulous...however I'm not sure how streamlined it would look if it weren't lined, the pockets would definitely have to be beige so they wouldn't show through white.

Very gorgeous! Very nice! Super pretty, the and lacey part is form fitting but the bottom is very flowily and stretchy. The fit was as I expected. I am 5'4 about 175lbs. A little long, I would probably suggest getting this hemmed if it's for an important occasion. The green is also a little darker than I expected

Yikes! Not as pictured Super short in the front with very little “high low” vibe from the skirt. The waist is nonexistent and the skirt starts right under the bust making this incredibly unflattering. I’m 5’10” and expect some challenges with any dress fit due to my height, but this is awful.

not as long as expected but still cute sure cute and comfy. it was barley to the floor without heels on but it wasn't too too short. I would've liked it better if it was 3 inches longer. Im 5'7 about 230 and I got a xxl. the fit was great my biggest problem was length.

not as long as expected but still cute sure cute and comfy. it was barley to the floor without heels on but it wasn't too too short. I would've liked it better if it was 3 inches longer. Im 5'7 about 230 and I got a xxl. the fit was great my biggest problem was length.

Surprised by this dress, has zipper at side. Lays nicely on, feminine fit. Sewing isn’t best quality but it is Amazon after all. Perfect for wedding or semi formal event. I’m 5’9 and 180lbs for reference, ordered large.

Pleasantly Surprised with Fit! Surprised with how well it fit and that it was flattering. It did not look great on a hanger or folded so I was pleasantly surprised when I tried it on! The chest area is a little loose and sheer though it's a very conservative dress with a high neck line. The sleeves and hem length were just right (I'm 5'5"). I docked a star due to the comfort of the fabric; the sleeves get a little itchy and the lace catches easily.

Was hesitant but did not disappoint! Surprisingly fantastic. I had to get a dress for a cruise and saw this on a Buzzfeed article and gave it a shot. We were joking that it would be a fail but it most definitely is not! I’m 5’6” and the length will allow low heels. The only thing is the color didn’t quite match the one I ordered but it doesn’t change how pretty and comfortable this is. It is comparable quality to something you can find in a brick and mortar store and shipping was quicker than anticipated. Highly recommend!

Worked perfectly Surprisingly, this dress actually worked for me! It came out of the bag as a wrinkled mess and I was skeptical. After washing, drying, and steaming it, I think it turned out nicely. For reference, I ordered a small. I am 5’5” and 124lbs.

taking the time to write this review because this dress was high quality and good price. i did get the XS at first but it’s true it runs tight in the shoulders and stomach. the small fit great i’m 5’2” and about 115 pounds. i was comfortable all night at a wedding it’s modest but also classy

Perfect for a beach wedding! Talk about feeling like a goddess! This dress is gorgeous! It has adjustable cold shoulders and a slit up each leg. I am 5’3 and it lightly swept across the floor when I walked in flat sandals. If I would have worn heels, it wouldn’t have touched the ground. The dusty rose color was just as pictured. It was very comfortable to wear and easy to put on and take off. It has an elastic waistband with no belt but if you can find a belt thick enough to cover the band, I think it would look nice. But if you are attending a beach wedding and looking for something to wear, this dress is perfect. I am wearing a size small and I am 5’3, 135 lbs.

This is the Second “72 Styles Dress” I Have Purchased in a Month! The “72 Styles Infinity Dress” in a beautiful Teal (greenish blue) color arrived promptly and was better than described online. I chose this knee length dress to wear to an upcoming party. It would make a beautiful bridesmaid’s dress as well. I knew from the start that this dress would be a winner. Just three weeks earlier I had chosen a full length “72 Styles Infinity Dress” in Blush Pink color to wear as a bridesmaid in a wedding. Four other bridesmaids wore the identical dress in the same color. Yet everyone looked beautiful and unique as they created their own personal style of bodice type with an infinity of different styles to choose from (please see photos.) I have designed and sewn custom Bridal Gowns and formal dresses for many years. The truth today is that quality fabric by the yard is very expensive. If on a budget, then this high quality "72 Styles Infinity Dress" is a 5*+ winner. It has many exceptional features at a very affordable price. PROS: * High Quality Materials and Construction - The exquisite soft hand and hefty richness of the "Teal” fabric was immediately impressive. I also noticed that the dress was amazingly wrinkle free right out of the bag and box. Within 24 hours of hanging in a humid bathroom area, it was entirely wrinkle free. * Unbelievably comfortable to wear in any style that you choose! * Excellent attention to detail - all seams are encased, neatly sewn to accommodate 4-way stretching, and there are no loose threads. This dress can be hemmed if desired. * The soft and satiny fabric has an eye-catching, subtle sheen to it, adding to its beauty and attractiveness. Fabric is made of 92% Polyester for strength and 8% Spandex for elasticity. * The really unique advantage of this amazing, patented gown is that you have 72+ bodice styles to choose from. Go online to You Tube at home or in the library and check out the videos that offer tutorials on bodice-tying variations. You are only limited by your imagination. When practicing, it's to have a buddy behind you to help you with draping and tying. I practiced alone in front of a full-length mirror with a hand-held mirror assisting me in viewing the back. Bringing all the bridesmaids dresses to your Bachelorette party and experimenting is even more fun. * Everybody has a different shape and size, and being able to customize a dress to your own flattering style and preferences is a real asset. Different bodice designs bring a lovely variety to the wedding party.... or you can all wear the same style bodice and wear that unique dress in different complementary colors. * There are 30 gorgeous, elegant colors and unlimited styles from which to choose and/or invent yourself. * Style-wise, the two gently pleated, slightly overlapping bodice pieces that rise up from the waist are a generous 12" in width and 78" (6-1/2') in length. That gives you an amazing amount of fabric to drape, twist, wrap and tie in unlimited ways around your neck, waist and upper body. If you don't require that much fabric in bodice ties, develop your own "haute couture." You can neatly cut some fabric off to fashion hair ties, weaves, bows, small drawstring bags and more to complement your outfit. * This is a "one-size fits all" dress, recommended for US sizes 0-16. I wear a size 16, as I am big-boned, 5'8", 38B and 155 lbs. The dress fits me perfectly. I am probably near the upper limit as far as elasticized waist, length and bandeau fit go. * The included tube top/bandeau (for added modesty) that arrived with my 0-16 dress measures 12' x 14" and may offer little support for oversized girls. Consider purchasing a complementary bandeau with more support. * This Eye Candy formal dress can be worn repeatedly to different events by varying the bodice style. If you need a long dress for one occasion and then tire of it, you can shorten the longer dress to knee or cocktail length for a different occasion. The cut-off fabric could make a beautiful matching cape or bolero jacket. * One Size Plus is available for women who wear US 18-24. Once again, large-chested women may want to purchase their own sturdy, coordinating bandeau that offers more support and coverage than the skinny tube top offered for free with the dress. * An ideal dress for pregnant women, the stretchy fabric drapes and flows well and follows the contour of the body. Just place the elastic waistband over your baby bump. After delivery, the dress still fits. It is especially useful if you are nursing. No need to buy additional maternity wear for a formal occasion. * The gorgeous Teal fabric is True to Color. The fabric is stretchy and is non-see-through on me. Of course, fabric stretch increases the degree of see-through. If so, a half-slip can be worn underneath for more coverage if desired. * The dress hangs, drapes and flows with movement beautifully. * Ideal dress for many occasions as it takes up little space when neatly folded - a "travel" gown that resists wrinkles, prom, wedding, evening out, party, maternity, cruise-wear, award recognition night and more. *Recommended hand wash only in cold water for this non-shrink fabric. CONS: * NO INSTRUCTIONS INCLUDED! You Tube videos and other online info to the rescue! ... Or use your own wonderful imagination! SUMMARY: Fashionable, inexpensive, cool and comfortable, easy care, adjusts perfectly to weight changes, limitless style possibilities.... all in one beautiful dress. As you read the many reviews, think about the $45 you are spending. This is not a $150 to $200 dress. If that's in your budget, then look elsewhere. For $43 this is an incredibly good-looking and good value for the money! Enjoy! Highly Recommended.

Magnificent dress- pay attention to sizing- The color is not as bright as pictured- it’s not as bright a purple. It’s much darker. It is very fitted through the chest- and the dress is quite long. I’m 5’ 6”- it hit the ground. I wore flats in the wedding picture because my cousin, sister, and bride are shorter than me. The length was perfect for me with 3” heels. My cousin and sister are about 2” shorter- and it dragged- they wore heels- and it still dragged a bit. The material is awesome- and I would suggest this a perfect winter church/wedding dress. Keep in mind if you have animals or brush up against anything- the dress will cling to everything- ie- you need a lint roller. And finally the fit- I’m 36H/38G bra size- in most shirts, I can wear a size large (12-14). I’m a size 16/18 in pants- I bought the Xl in the dress. It fit great through the hip because of the natural flow. It was tight through the chest and natural through the waist (the Picts shown without spanx- which will give a more flattering look)- I think it fit perfectly for my size. The neckline was higher than expected- no cleavage- which is perfect for a church dress/ formal occasion. My sister is a 32DDD- she wears a size 10 pants. She wore the size large in the dress- it fit her great too- I’d size based on your bust more than your hips- ie if you have smaller or fuller hips- the shape of the dress camouflages it. Base your size primarily on your chest and waist. The material gives, and it became more comfortable the longer it was worn. It is a very pretty dress that can easily be dressed up for special occasions.

The faux wrap skirt had a cute ruffle, but the wrap ties did not tie tight enough to match the seam to the seam joining the skirt and bodice. I wish it fit because it would have been perfect for a holiday party. I bought a medium based on the size chart and it was too large everywhere but length. I'm 5'0" and 120lbs, muscular build.

Nice color but strange fit around waist The color was nice. I like the cut of the dress. It leaves up to adjust size. However the shape was totally off. Also the pleats are not ironed well and does not have a nice look to it. I have purchased many similar cut dresses and it always looks flattering. This was just not right for some reason. I am 30 inch waist and 34 bust for reference. The dress was somewhat loose as a medium .. the bulging jar nothing to do with it being too small ..I am returning.

Exceeded expectations! The color was not at all as pictured, but I loved it anyhow! The fit was perfect. I'm a 36DD, about 210lbs (but carry my weight lower down), and the size 12 was perfect. There was a lot of room to spare while lacing it up, but the chest area was at capacity. The stitching was beautiful. The loops for the lacing were sturdy. I wore it to a 1940s ball and had many people ask if it was authentic vintage. THE BEST PART: It has DEEP pockets!! I danced the night away and had my phone and lipstick in the pockets. They were so deep that I had no concerns about losing my stuff, and the pockets hide nicely in the material. Absolutely worth the price.

Hand wash only! The description says they're machine washable, but I ordered the black with lace and the white with black flowers, and both had the same tag - hand wash, do not tumble dry, cool iron. The fabric of the black and white is stiff, and was folded/packaged small, so it came out very wrinkled. I hung it up, and the wrinkles haven't fallen out at all. Not a big deal in and of itself, but given the real washing instructions, I wonder how easy it will be to get the wrinkles out once washed. As stated way down in the description somewhere, the black and white has no stretch At All. I normally wear an 8 and got the black in that size, but it was tight around my trunk, so I changed my order of the black and white to a 10/XL, and it's still very snug in the trunk. For reference, I'm 5'5, 32 DDD, and 160.

Runs very small, said 44 inch bust but it was only 32 inches The design is good, fabric is nice, but the torso is very short with the pockets being right under the bustline. I might buy it again a few sizes bigger and alter it to fit me properly in both bustline and torso length.

Gorgeous, great quality dress! The dress arrived quickly and exceeded my expectations. The color is a gorgeous dark green and the fabric is great quality. I ordered a size small. I got so many compliments on it. Great dress for an amazing price.

Love love it! The dress arrived way ahead of schedule. I returned the first one because it was tight around the chest. 2nd one fit like a glove. It is true to fit. I had read reviews stating go small. I am 5’ 2” and 165 lbs. Smaller is not an option. Very comfortable, and zero ironing is required.

Good Quality, shipping nightmare The dress color and quality is above average. Great dress for wedding party. It can be tightened (which isn't done in picture) with the back lacing from chest to bellow waist. There's integrated bra which is pretty good. The dress is prettier in person than in photos - as the dress gives a smooth long line and nice wide straight line at shoulder to make everything look thinning. With heels, the length doesn't need adjustment. I did add 8 hook/eyes to the lacing back flap to keep the dress smooth in back - otherwise the large panel behind the lacing is moving and easily bunching. Easy fix to get perfect fit. (Done after picture). The nearly month long shipping that changed to later & later dates was a hassle. I complained and it was eventually sent priority mail. Size 12, 5' 6'' - no special measurements sent. Thank you.

Elegant, quality dress that's easy to wear, in great color The dress is beautiful. My daughter wore it for a holiday performance, and it looked lovely both in person and on TV. The green is VERY dark -- can look almost black in some photos -- but that wasn't a problem, just be aware. We also ordered the same dress in the blue as a possible option, but it was a bright blue, not a deep sapphire. It was still pretty, but the color was not as good with my daughter's coloring. (Blue would look better on a blond or on someone with deeper skin tone.) The dress is very easy to wear; it is a stretch velvet. Fabric is soft and comfy but substantial quality. We do recommend getting a strapless slip of some kind as you can't wear a regular bra. Also, the slip allows you to go without pantyhose -- everything is nice and smooth -- a nice benefit -- everyone hates wearing pantyhose! The dress is formfitting and stretchy, so you want to mitigate panty lines, etc. My daughter is 5' 6" and the dress had to be shortened by about an inch; she wore 2-inch heels. If you're wearing higher heels, you may not have to get it shortened. Overall, a great buy that arrived 2 days earlier than they said it would. I would definitely buy from this place again!

Lower quality Glitter NOT sequins The dress is glitter and not sequins. It could photography well but up close it is CHEAP-O looking. Of course, some ppl would like this. Just make the description match the dress. Overall, for a plus size dress I like that the split is not a foolish ridiculous height. The industry is going wild. They went from dressing all Plus size women like a grandma to the other extreme. Believe me - above my knee doesn’t look like a 20-something yo plus woman AND I don’t want to sit uncomfortably exposed ALL nite. For the mature, This slit is great on standing. Less forgiving on sitting. If you don’t like that, be sure to wear it to an event with tablecloths JIC! I think a quick thread to secure the split would be good too (although not necessary). The read could use a bit more darting. You won’t hv to wear a specialty bra. At 5’6.5” tall it skins the floor and won’t be floor length in heels. It is farther in the back for shaping but i think it’s still missing a dart. Thats just preference. The front had a good flattering cut. I’m a size 20. Photos do not feature proper foundation wear (1st quick try on).

Beautiful dress but poor craftsmanship The dress is gorgeous, vibrant neon pink color. The all over ruching is very flattering and forgiving, if you have a pouch, this will hide it. The length is good, I'm 5'8 and it's providing enough modesty coverage. The problem is with the craftsmanship, the dress is crooked. The entire appeal of this dress hinges on how it fits! The dress is very cute once you find the correct fit. Amazon recommended size medium for me (I’m 5’5”, 135-140lbs, 34-DD bra). Usually Amazon’s recommendation is correct but this time it was not. Yes, the medium was too big but I almost didn’t reorder the dress because of how terrible the dress looked when it didn’t fit. Usually, if I get a size too big, I can at least tell that it would look good if it only fit. For this style dress, the entire appeal is in how it fits. Consider sizing down and if you do happen to purchase the dress in a size too big, give the dress a chance in the correct size! I’m happy I did because it’s actually very cute when it hugs the body! Comfortable, stretchy, soft, with a bit of sparkle—which I love! These pictures are kind of terrible, but I hope you can see the difference in size and how it makes the dress hang overall.

So cute and flattering The dress is very flattering, even if you have a little bit of a belly and the way it’s cut on the shoulders, make my arms look more toned. The coral is a very vibrant, orange pink. I think this color looks very good on fair or dark skin. For reference I am 5’5”, 153 pounds, 36B, with a 31” waist , and 40” hips. I went back-and-forth on deciding between a medium and a large. Ultimately, I ordered the medium and I’m glad that I did. Even though the sizing chart says it will fit a waist between 28.7” and 30.2” and hips 39”-40”. I found that it can do a bit more than what was stated because theres a stretch to the lining of the dress. The only place that has a thin elastic band is right under the bust and the waist definitely flounces out. So there is a lot more forgiveness than you would think. In my photos, I lifted the layers so you can see how the dress is divided into different layers with the unders slip and how it allows for a little bit more wiggle room of the hips and waist.

Gorgeous Dress but few issues I had to fix... The Dress itself is beautiful however it was way too big for me so I had to get it fixed before wearing. The length was way too much (may be because I'm 5'2") but bust area was too big. Also some strings were coming out so I had to make sure to cut those without the little stones falling off. The sewing was not perfect as you could see the defaults through the transparent front and sleeves. I was expecting a bit more high quality sewing for the price but overall, I'm not disappointed with the stones on the dress and although it was still big after the tailor "sort of" fixed it, I still had lots of compliments for New Year's Eve. I wore the dress only for 2 hours because I didn't feel confident in it. I need to find better tailor to fix this and customize it to my size...

Comfortable, but not overly flattering. The dress itself is very comfortable. The sheer outer layer has a pretty print. The under layer is form fitting and rides up a little as you walk. If you don’t want any unwanted curves to show, I would pass on this dress. As I am 5’4”, this dress sits fine for me lengthwise, but on taller people it will be on the shorter side. What I thought I would really like, the sheer 3/4 sleeves, just doesn’t look right on me. The way the sleeve crosses over, makes it flare out funny. This might sound strange, but when it is on, the contrast of the body against the sleeve just looks off somehow. I actually think it would be prettier with a short sleeve as a result. The overall flow isn’t what I thought it would be. I am sure this will be different for different body types though. It is OK, not great.

Looked beautiful on my daughter for Homecoming! The dress looked stunning on my daughter for homecoming. She loved it & said it was very comfortable. It had some stretch to it. Wasn’t lined, but it didn’t show. She is 5ft 7 around, 120lbs, somewhat broader shoulders, shorter waist & long legs. We got a size small and it fit perfectly. But I think it has some stretch and almost fit me & i weigh 150, 5”7 as well, but I’d go up to a Med for me. She needed to wear high heels, otherwise it would’ve dragged on the ground, so keep that in mind. She tried on 6 dresses I ordered from both Amazon & David’s Bridal & this was the winner. It’s a true Kelly/dark emerald green, not blue green at all. Looked great with gold jewelry shoes & bag. I think it could be dressed down a but too, but we went dressy, as why not?! The David’s bridal had some much better quality dresses with boning & lining, but this still won out & can’t beat the price! It did have an inline zipper & she could shimmy into it or put it on over head. It doesn’t really hide curves, so if that’s a concern, spanks maybe needed (like for me lol) but my daughter is only 16, so she doesn’t need it yet! She got lots of compliments and definitely stood out. All her friends said she looked like a model. Any girl deserves to feel pretty & so this was a big win! Mom is pleased.

Beautiful but runs a bit small. The dress looks beautiful on but looks unfinished. The bottom looks as though the tulle is just cut, no stitching or trim. I chose the xxl thinking it would be bigger but it was a perfect fit when it arrived, slightly snug after 5 days of cruise food. I am 5'7" and 190 (possibly 195 in photo). However, the style masks the snugness. I would buy again. Definitely use the sizing chart!

Nice, but not the best stitching The dress material has some stretch and also flows and sways nicely, I'm 5'5 and the length was at my ankles when tried on with low shoes/sneakers on, if you're top-heavy be prepared to use a safety pin or stitching to keep the v-cut from gaping too widely to avoid boob spillage. It seems mostly true to size otherwise if following their posted sz measurement guide. I had purchased this to wear to a winter themed holiday party. It is comfortable on but the band stitching is not most secure, I'll probably return it or be forced to use a strip of fabric/ribbon like a belt so the poor stitching will be hidden/not visible or will definitely have to stitch and fix it, if I need to wear it without a decorative belt accessory. Other than the band being poorly stitched it seems very nice and can be used plain or embellished to add more glam.

Better then I was expecting. The dress was my 5th dress I ordered. All the others didn’t fit me the way I wanted till I got this one. I was so relieved. Nice Dress The dress was nice, and I absolutely LOVED the color - it fit a bit too big on top however. Here are my stats: pant size 4; 36 C; I bought a medium... Despite being a tad big on top, the dress looked nice and I received compliments on my dress, so no one noticed that it was loose on top other than me. All good. The other tiny inconvenience is that there wasn't a hook/eye clasp at the top of the side zipper. It would have been a lot easier to zipper up by myself if that was included, but, eh it was a $30 dress... What are you going to do? I did, however, have a problem in how my package was delivered. It arrived in the 'zip-lock' style bag. Normally when I order from Amazon, the clothing bag (with zipper top) is secured in a packaging bag of some sort, this was not the case with this package. It was just the flimsy clothing bag with a shipping label slapped on it which wouldn't have been so bad I suppose if they had secured the zipper portion of the bag. So basically, anyone could have opened the bag, taken out the dress (for whatever reason) or it could have opened and fallen out completely leaving me with a delivered empty bag. Listen, this might not be a big deal but it was for me. I included photos of the packaging, wish I had thought of taking a selfie with dress on

Beautiful The dress was ordered for family photos. I ordered the plum color in size 10. In the photo it looks more on the burgundy plum side, but in person it’s a deep plum purple, a gorgeous color. Lovely The eggplant color and fabric is gorgeous! The cowl neckline is wide enough to be worn off the shoulders and drapes beautifully across the front, back and shoulders. A beautiful jewel embellishes the horizontal pleated bodice at the waistline above the gatherings of the skirt. The pleated bodice is very comfortable! The skirt folds beautifully down the front moves freely when walking. I hardly noticed the slit which starts above the knee. The back of the dress lays very smooth. Perfect length for a 5’7”-5’8” woman wearing a 1” platform or 2-3” heel shoe. I chose a different style Alex Evening dress in a size14 for a wedding which i also like.

Great dress for price! The eggplant color is so pretty. It's a dark purplish maroon color. I ordered up a size so I could sit and dance comfortably at my son's wedding. I'm 5ft 4in and usually a size 18. Im a chunky hour glass shape. The 20 fits perfectly! The jacket fabric is a little bit scratchy (nothing I can't tolerate for one evening) but the dress is lined with a soft, super stretchy lining and it drapes very comfortably. The sequin design adds a touch of elegance so you feel like your wearing a comfy sundress but "kicked up a notch". For a dress that will only be worn once or twice, and costs less than $150, you will be happy with this purchase! The gemstones are glued on so you must hand wash it. If you return it. I do not think they will refund the $16 shipping fee. I do not regret this purchase!!

Good quality, great price and very pretty The embroidered tulle overlay is beautiful and well made. There aren't any loose strings and the embroidery was done well. The lining is heavy and is a pretty eggshell blue. I dropped a star because it does fit a little oddly around the armpit and chest area. I am a 30 DDD and ordered a small. There is still a little bit of extra material that creates a small gap between my armpit and my rib cage. I can pull the dress lower onto my ribs to flatten it out. But it doesn't last once I start moving around. I'm hoping wearing a different bra may help fix the issue. I still feel this is a great dress, especially for the price.

The empire waist, flowy skirt and sleeves are all classics in plus size dresses for a reason. Really comfortable, flattering, fun, and easy to dance in. I'm 5'10" and it was long enough to wear with heels. The sequin details on the bodice sparkled in the sun. Super happy!

Very forgiving cut The empire waistline is flattering. The lil belt thing is ok...a bit of distraction for the tummy. The green is a true forest green...would be nice for Christmas. Meh The fabric and embroidery is surprisingly good for such an inexpensive dress, albeit it quite thin. The length is too short though, and I’m only 5’4. The biggest issue with the dress for me, though, is that the top part goes up too high and looks kinda frumpy.

Thick fabric The fabric does not feel thin/cheap. It feels like good quality and could last a few wears. The built in bra, to me, felt like it gives very little support. The strap was VERY loose on me and appears it’s designed for a larger breasted person. For reference I wear a 40D. The flowy sleeve were very comfortable. The slit was also not too revealing as I initially thought. However, the sizing is a bit weird. According to the sizing chart I was between a size 24X and 26X. For reference I normally wear a size 2-3X (20-22) and am 5’8” tall. On me, the 26X was very big. I felt like I was swimming in the dress. I think I could easily go down at least 1-2 sizes. I had ordered both sizes as their shipping said it would take a while and didn’t want to end up without a dress for my event. The seller did message me. They asked if I meant to order both dresses. I let them know that yes I did since I was in between sizes andn wasn’t sure if the smaller one would fit. They told me that if I returned one of the dresses I would have to pay for the shipping back to China (although that is not stated) that is I was sure I wanted to purchase both sizes. I let them know my measurements and they recommended I get the 26X or they could make me a custom dress. The custom dress was obviously final sale. I told them I would just take the larger size. They did ask when I needed my dress. I let them know and the shipping was faster than stated. I know have to buy another dress that is smaller and hope it gets here before the event.

Totally worth it. The fabric is a nice weight, heavy enough to have structure lightly enough to be comfortable. Pretty well made, I like the four fold interior binding at the neckline and armholes. This keeps the lace from getting scratchy on your skin and also gives it a very clean finish. The fit was spot on to what we expected, I did a small "petite alteration" at the shoulder seam because my daughter is only 5 ft, but it was easily achieved and the basic material of the dress was structurally sound enough for the alterations. (Not always the case) We added a petticoat for fullness. Little miss is wearing an XS, the skirt length from waist to hem is 23.5" and her petticoat was 24 in. It's was a separate item that sat on her waist so they're not going to align perfectly and she had about 2 in of tulle showing which was perfect for us. It's a nice true black, Slim A-line. 48" sweep along the curve (flat)

Nice, but longer than expected The fabric is nice and soft but thick enough to feel good quality. The color is true and beautiful. Not sure I'm loving the poufy shoulders that look more poufy on me than in the pictures, but I'll live with them. My only complaint is that it is way longer than I expected, which makes it look a bit frumpy on me. The pictures show it coming just below the knee, but on me (5'6" wearing a small) it comes half way down my calf. I think it would be cuter a bit shorter, maybe I'll get it taken up. Other than that, the dress fits nicely. The sleeves are nice and long and the elastic at the end is not too tight to be uncomfortable. The empire waist fits well and the v neck is not too deep to be awkward. Size seems true. I am 5'6", 135lbs, 36C bust and the small fits perfectly. Other than the awkward length (and poufy shoulders that I'm not sure about), this is a nice dress that will be a versatile addition to my wardrobe.

The top of the dress is lined which is also a nice touch. This dress would be perfect to wear for attending a summer wedding. I'd say the price is pretty reasonable.

Wrong color The fabric is silky, not stiff like the black dress pictured in the reviews. It’s flattering on, but I ordered lilac and received a mauve pink which is a bummer because I hate pink but I need the dress for an upcoming event so it’s too late to get a return and replacement and no guarantee it will be the right color. That being said, I’m 5’7 and 160lbs and it fits perfectly, a little loose but that’s good for a dress like this, you don’t want it too tight or it won’t drape properly. If you’re worried it will be small order a size up, better to order a little large than too small. When you tie it around the back it makes it difficult to raise your arms but that’s just weird construction. The waistline is also a lot higher than pictured but it’s a 40$ dress. It could be way worse but I’ll definitely wear this and maybe order more colors or find a company that makes these with a lower waistline.

The fabric is sort of like satin. As a result, it was incredibly static-prone. If you have pets, you will have fur all over it. It also bunched up a lot until we sprayed it with a bit of water to neutralize the static. However, I don't think you'll be able to wear this item with pantyhose or body shapers unless you rub anti-static cling sheets all over it. The top is fairly generous and stretchy. The medium dress would easily fit a B to D cup bust. The bottom half is less generous and not stretchy. If you are a pear shape and in between sizes, I would recommend sizing up. The black medium dress did NOT have a liner, contrary to what I saw on another reviewer's video. But it was not see through and was fine without one. The sleeves can be worn comfortably up or down below shoulders. The hemline came down mid calf, but rises to just cover the knees when you sit down. My daughter in the pictures is 5'2" and 120 lbs and the medium dress fits great.

Size down if you’re in between. But the quality is unimpressive. The fabric’s texture gives away that it’s a cheap blazer. I have my fair share of cheap-but-good Amazon finds, but this one…not so much. The button looks big, too bulbous, and tacky. It’s hard to tell in my pic, but in person it’s pretty bad. If the jacket wasn’t too big and I decided to keep it, I’d literally replace the button. The fabric weave isn’t smooth enough to fool anyone — it’s obviously medium-low quality. Not thin, but its medium-weight feel doesn’t do enough to hide that it’s poor quality. No way could I wear this to a job interview in person. It might work if it was via Zoom. Size L — I often wear sizes medium and large. I got a Large. I’m 145 lbs, 5’4” 38D with broad shoulders, narrow waist, broad hips. The large was BIIIIIG on me. Too big to wear it as a fashionably oversized blazer. It didn’t taper at the waist enough either, so even if it fit me overall, I suspect it would’ve been boxy, and again, not fashionably so on me. Doesn’t have that 90s blazer look. If you’re an apple shape, it might work for you. Too long overall. The arms are eeextra long, and I have somewhat long arms. I suspect the medium would’ve been too long there as well. That said, if you want to wear it with the sleeves cuffed, you can show off the inner lining—that material is quite nice, actually. All-in-all, you’re better off finding a budget blazer at H&M, Ross, etc. I’m returning this and not bothering with trying the medium. It looks better in the pictures than real life.

Size down if you’re in between. But the quality is unimpressive. The fabric’s texture gives away that it’s a cheap blazer. Too large and weird underarm The idea of this dress is cute, but 1) the size chart is wrong and 2) the arm hole is way too big and lets your undergarments show. Lightweight and flowy dress The layers flow beautifully, and the dress is comfortable, yet elegant. I purchased the apricot (ivory) and the color will work for many occasions. I normally wear a size 10 and I purchased a medium and it falls in all the right places, including the length. So many dresses are too long for my 5’3’’ frame, but this dress is just right. The lining prevents the dress from being see through and has a built-in slip. The sleeves are sheer, and the lantern shape adds style without being too bulky.The dress fastens with two small buttons and elastic loops at the back of the neck, which are a bit challenging to fasten by yourself. I also found my hair got easily stuck in the buttons when it was pulled back and braided. If you have long hair, this is something to consider.

Doesn’t Really Look as Advertised The material doesn’t look the same, and the color is a bit off. The neck is really big and doesn’t look like it does on the model. Additionally, the part at the stomach where it goes from floofed to fitted looks good on the model, however, on the actual dress, it is just a piece of elastic and it isn’t very secure. Some people may prefer the elastic band because it creates a bit more wiggle room for size and could be really nice. It is definitely comfy! I ordered a small (Bust: 36”, Waist: 26”, Hips: 36”) and as you can see from the photos, it wasn’t that small. It had no shape to it naturally and it looked very unflattering. I also include photos of how it *could* look if altered. However, it was a $42 dress so I didn’t want to mess with the materials through alterations. The company was very kind and allowed me to return the dress, and I have had no problem with them. They are a good a trustworthy company. The dress itself isn’t even that horrendously off from the ad, but it wasn’t what I was looking for. I am a bridesmaid and, while it might be cute for a night out, it didn’t seem elegant enough in person to be suitable as a bridesmaids dress.

Elegant dress that wraps around you and let you show your shoes. The Miusol Elegant V Neck Ruffle Style Formal Dress is an easy-to-wear dress that enhances your appearance. It features a V-neckline, without sleeves and just covers the top of your shoulders. The high-low hemline allows to show off your shoes. The wavily ruffle cascade from the upper leg on one side to the ankle on the opposite leg and wraps around both legs on the back. Make sure you are able to fill the bust area (small size / 34DD >), since it is a bit looser than on the photo in the description and even the button won't help. For better results use a steamer instead of an iron. This is a graceful dress to wear at a wedding, date night and dressy party. It enhances your curves and figure without constricting you, which make this dress easy to wear.

Love Pockets The moms out there should know first and foremost, this dress has pockets! I think we take for granted pockets until we are mothers and it never fails, we’re out somewhere without our purse and inevitably need a tissue for our kid. The quality of the dress itself is seemingly very nice. It’s heavy in a good sense without being overwhelming. It has a liner under the skirt and up at the bodice so it’s not see-through. I am 5‘4“ tall 128 pounds and this hits me midcalf. I bought a size small and there is still a good bit of stretch in the waist. These pictures were taken right out of the bag so it’s definitely wrinkled and needs to be steamed. But overall, I’m very excited to potentially wear this for family pictures in the fall. For this price point, I don’t think that you can go wrong and would definitely recommend it.

Multicolor Pink is a Somewhat Dusty Rose/Coral and Print was not Flattering The multicolor pink is not my cup of tea. It is more drab than I expected from the pictures. I took a photo with a Sherwin Williams paint deck to help others get an accurate idea of the color. It is between Sherwin Williams colors SW6317, SW6318, SW6324, SW25 -- dusty rose/dusty coral color. In my opinion print on the blouse gave it a kind of "granny" look. I am 5'8 and 162 lb and usually wear 8 -10. I bought a large. It was comfortable and fit across my shoulders, bust and arms. However, blouse is quite full across the waist, and the horizontal nature of the print across the bottom made my midsection look extra wide. I am returning the blouse for this reason. I also bought this blouse in a more subtle blue pattern in the same size that I am keeping because it doesn't visually broaden my waist like this print did. I think this design might look better on a more slender person who likes muted, dusty colors.

PSA: get this dress if you have mom bod or have been struggling to hide your tummy The nitty gritty: my current weight 142 lbs. height 5’2”. Bra: 34 B full cup (could also wear 34C demi-cup). Small of waist 30”, widest girth across belly button 39”. I purchase 2 different colors of this dress style in Medium based on my bust and the measurement for the small of my waist. This dress has a higher crew neckline (no risk of spillage and is cut so that it’s flattering for smaller bust too. The skirt portion is a fit and flare style that hugs your back and flares out at the top and not at the hips. This is important if you have a postpartum mom belly or stubborn belly fat that just won’t go away like me. Many of the fit and flair dresses I have purchased/tried on flair out at the side of the hips so I look very pregnant (and I’m not). Since this dress flairs out at the top of the hips (not the side) it hides my mom belly nicely giving me a feminine shape. In one of the side pics, I placed my hands under my belly to show how bloated I can get after eating so you can see that with this dress no one else can tell I have this bloated mom belly. I usually do a sit-down test on the dresses I try on to see 1) how comfortable it is while sitting, 2) does it accentuate my bloated belly, and 3) if it rides up all weird on my legs. This dress style passes the test with flying colors. This dress is made to accommodate those with longer torsos, so it bunches up a bit in the back (as seen in photo). But it’s not a big deal to me; usually I have a bolero shrug (seen in pic) on anyways since many places blasts the AC and I get chilly easily. I feel this dress shape can easily be worn for casual or dressier occasions. The top part of the dress is lined, but the lower half is not lined. The cloth material has a little stretch to it-not a whole lot. I love both dress colors that I got: Steel Blue and Black painting (white with black splashes of colors and black outlines of flowers), and will plan on buying more colors in the future. Highly recommend this dress!

The photos don’t do this dress Justice. I LOVE this dress. It’s absolutely beautiful. We were inside a hotel’s conference center in central Texas in November. I don’t know what the inside temperature was, but this dress was unbelievable comfortable. I wasn’t hot or cold. The outside temperature was in the mid 70s. The dress is 100% polyester-inner lining as well as the sheer outer fabric. The dress is true to color. I ordered teal. The entire dress is teal, no secondary colors. I’m 5’1”, 139 pounds, 36DD, and wear a size 8 in my NY and Company petite dress pants. I’ve been wearing size 8 or 10 in jeans (Arizona Jean Co, Sonoma from Kohl’s). I ordered a size 10 in this dress due to others’ reviews. The 10 fit perfectly. I didn’t think the underarms were too high or tight. Maybe a smidge, but not enough to bother me. The dress has no pockets :o( The front on the bust has a vertical seam that caused the bust to be a bit pointy. You can see it from the side in one of the pictures. But again, I didn’t think it was that big of a deal. It’s hardly noticeable-I’m just anal about details. In the photos, I’m wearing a Maideform T-Shirt bra with underwire. No push up. The straps on the dress are wide enough that you don’t need a strapless bra. And the back is high enough that you can’t see the back bra strap. This dress is HAND WASH ONLY, and air dry. I followed the directions after wear and washed it in cold water in my tub, and am hanging it/laying it flat to dry. A little bit of the dye washed out when I was washing it-probably normal after a first wash. I would recommend heels with this dress. I tried dressy, strappy sandals, but it just didn’t do the dress Justice. This dress is amazing. My friends LOVED it. -Wife

I’m 5’1”, 139 pounds, 36DD, and wear a size 8 in my NY and Company petite dress pants. I’ve been wearing size 8 or 10 in jeans (Arizona Jean Co, Sonoma from Kohl’s). I ordered a size 10 in this dress due to others’ reviews. The 10 fit perfectly. I didn’t think the underarms were too high or tight. Maybe a smidge, but not enough to bother me. The dress has no pockets :o( The front on the bust has a vertical seam that caused the bust to be a bit pointy. You can see it from the side in one of the pictures. But again, I didn’t think it was that big of a deal. It’s hardly noticeable-I’m just anal about details. In the photos, I’m wearing a Maideform T-Shirt bra with underwire. No push up. The straps on the dress are wide enough that you don’t need a strapless bra. And the back is high enough that you can’t see the back bra strap. This dress is HAND WASH ONLY, and air dry. I followed the directions after wear and washed it in cold water in my tub, and am hanging it/laying it flat to dry. A little bit of the dye washed out when I was washing it-probably normal after a first wash. I would recommend heels with this dress. I tried dressy, strappy sandals, but it just didn’t do the dress Justice. This dress is amazing. My friends LOVED it. -Wife

I would recommend sizing up since the back is adjustable but the arms are not.

Beautiful purple The purple color in this dress is absolutely gorgeous. My phone shows it as more fuchsia than it is up close and under bright daylight, but trust me, you'll love it. It is even nicer than the photos online and definitely one of the most beautiful and desirable shades of purple for attire. In terms of fabric, I am not crazy about these polyester fibers, but this is pretty thick, fairly forgiving with underwear lines, and offers a bit of compression. I am typically an S in dresses (5'5 and 130 lbs), though my top part is actually XS (size 2). I followed their size chart and got an M. It fits just slightly large in the bust area, so I think it was the right decision to go with an M, as the S may have been tight. I love that the design is modern, but also versatile. You can dress this up or down. At this price, this dress is a steal. Super nice, so I definitely recommend it.

Since I'm only 5'2", I wish this were a bit shorter, but the style is so great and it's so dang comfy, I really don't care! Even though it's one shoulder, it feels very secure. No risk of slipping. I ordered the medium and wouldn't change a thing. Normally a size 8-10 in dresses. I included a few pics so you can see the material up close. Please forgive all the cat hair on me, but it's good to note that this dress is like a magnet for pet hair.

Beautiful, comfortable dress The sequin part is light-weight and stretchy but, unfortunately, I think it could be a little hot/stuffy in some settings. It is one of the most flattering dresses for chubby girls, though. Shapewear would help even more. I'm 5' 5" and the chiffon part of the dress would need to be hemmed in order to be worn so keep that in mind as an extra expense.

Extremely Short! Beware The sequins are beautiful and not too itchy but the dress is so short it's nit wearable unless you want to flash your cootch to the world. I but both a 2X and 3X with the intention of returning whichever didn't fit. The 3X came first and was big so I think the 2X would have worked best size wise which is what I normally wear. I'm 5'8" and typically wear a 20-22 pant and this dress was more like a tunic top length. If you wore with leggings or tights you'd be okay, but that wasn't the look I was going for. My hubby enjoyed the free show, but you'll be giving everyone a show if you wear this in public. Thankfully it was easy to return.

Very Sparkly!!! The sequins on this dress give it a beautiful sparkle both in person and in photos. The dress is fully lined, and I did not feel any areas where the sequins could scratch my skin. The outer layer of the dress is a velvet material which kind of reminds me of a few of the Halloween costumes I have had over the years. One positive thing about this kind of material is that it does not wrinkle easily, so I am pleased with that. For a plus sized girl I have a smaller bust, and I feel like the proportions in the bust area don’t fit me very well. I have short legs and a short torso. The cups that are present in this dress are sewn in between the two layers so it would be very difficult to remove them and adjust them. The dress is definitely too long for me, but I expected that as I am only slightly above 5 feet tall. I ordered this dress for a Yule ball coming up in December. I haven’t yet decided if I’m going to keep it. It will probably be my back up dress in case I can’t find some thing more flattering and more appropriate for my proportions. I would say the dress is very well-made and pretty comfortable. It’s definitely a bit heavy, which makes it good for a winter ball but not so great for a summertime wedding. I chose not to have the seller do any customizations because I knew there was a chance I might wish to return it, and if they customize it for you, it is not returnable. The Amazon listing said free returns so if I do end up returning it, I will update this review to let you know how the return process went.

Flattering, Feminine, Flowy The shape of this blouse is gorgeous from top to bottom. The sleeves give it a nice feminine touch without being too ruffly. I got this one in green, and although the actual color is somewhat darker in person than the photo on the website, it is actually quite lovely and looks just as a good with dark jeans as with light blue and white. The flowers are white with subtle blue and purple accents. It is well shaped and flattering, and flowy in all the right spots (tummy). I loved it so much I bought the blue one, too! This will be part of my wardrobe for a long time to come. For reference, I am 5'10" and 173 lbs. and 38D with somewhat larger shoulders/upper arms. I bought this in Large and it fits perfectly, not tight anywhere.

Just Ok. Not worth 60+30 for fast delivery The shell fabric colors are vibrant. The green is a littler lighter than expected but still pretty. The velvet is shedding a little bit. I hope that doesn't get worse. The silhouette does not quite match the picture. The sleeves are a basic straight sleeve. There is no billowy bell shape at all. The lining fabric is also bigger than the outter shell which causes the slit to curl outward exposing the lining. The lining is also longer than the outer shell by about 1 inch, and somehow the overall length is about 2-3 inches short when it's on. The waist fits me but the bust is made for a woman with a much more full chest...like at least 3 times my size and I'm a 32D. Also, not a true wrap dress as the tie is not the true closure. Overall, not worth the hassle to return, but will take a little work to make it worth keeping.

Beautifully made dress at a reasonable cost The silhouette and color of this dress were exactly what I wanted for my son’s wedding. I figured it was too good to be true. I thought it probably wouldn’t fit and/or would be poorly made or made of low quality materials. For the price I took a risk and was so glad I did. There were absolutely no corners cut in the making of this dress. The skills of the seamstress were obviously exceptional. I was in a huge quandary about what size to order. From my actual measurements the chart indicated that I should wear a 14 or 16. I normally wear a 10 or 12 off the rack. I ordered a size 12 and it fits perfectly. I’m 5’ 5 1/2”, will wear 2” heals and need to have the hem taken up about 1 1/2 inches. I weigh 147 and the bodice is snug, but I have a very large rib cage.

Weird seam and stretchy fabric The straps are adjustable, which is great and the cowl neck was exactly as expected. There is a seam going diagonally through the bust. In the model pictures, she is bending over so it looked like a natural fold in fabric, or she has her hand over it so you can't see it and it's in a weird place, definitely didn't like it. I thought it was a manufacturing flaw but I ordered two sizes/ colors and they both had it. I'd say it has a fair amount of stretch, I tried both a medium and a small because of my hip measurement, and still felt like even tbe small was pretty stretchy (for reference, my hips measure 40") and I knew no matter what size I bought the bust would be too big for me. The slit was not too high, and added some sex appeal to the dress. It also hit at a good spot on my knees (I'm 5'6") I'd also say you need to choose your undergarments carefully. It showed every little line and even some moles! If it wasn't for that weird diagonal seam across the chest I would have given it 4 stars, but it really took the whole dress down.

Beautiful dress, great deal for the price. The things I really like about this dress are, first of all, it looks great, the print is beautiful, I love the style, this dress is very flattering, and I also love that it has pockets, huge bonus for me. I am 5ft 2in, 137 lbs. 36-D bra size. I ordered this dress in a medium, it does fit and it looks great, but it is a little tight at the waist. I does fit me a lot better when I wear shape wear underneath. It looks like it fits perfect. A large may have been better for my size though, but I worry a large would look too big, and not as fitted (I don’t know because I haven’t tried the large). The dress is mid-calf length on me, which I think is perfect. This dress does have two downfalls for me, both of which I might not have if I had gotten the large instead of medium, but I once again, I don’t know because I have not tried it on in a large. The first is that it was very tricky to zip up, I could not zip it up myself, I had to get my spouse to zip it for me. The other downfall for me is that I do have slightly limited range of motion in my shoulders and upper arms in this dress, it does not fit me quite right in the underarm area, which does limit my arm movements a little. For the most part this is not a problem because most of the time I am going someplace that I need to be dressed nice, I don’t need to move my arms that much, but it would make it hard to hold a baby or toddler, or dance, and it also makes it so it would be hard for me to wear to work. I would say the quality of this dress is medium, it is not a super high quality fabric, but it is not low quality either. The fabric is thin, but not see through, and I have no complaints about the quality of fabric or the stitching. Overall, I am very pleased with this dress, it is beautiful, very flattering, and very good deal for the price.

Soft, Comfortable, Easy To Dress Up, & Very Flattering - True To Size The title basically covers it. The pink was brighter than I expected but it worked wonderfully for the Diwali party I attended.For size reference I bought a Medium and it was perfect. I weigh about 150-150 lbs, am 5 ft 7", and hold most of my weight in my hips and butt. I also have an unflattering poochy belly because I like cheesecake but the dress didn't cling to my stomach. It fit nicely around my hips and waist so I still had body definition and didn't look like I was wearing a sack.Measurements are approximately: 36 C, 29" natural waist (smallest point), 32-33" under my belly button, 44" hips. Again, I like cookies so am not in my ideal weight range/shape but found the dress flattering, slimming, and elongating.

Good Quality for Cost; Brooch is Trash The top and pants are an okay quality, especially for the price. The fabric is a bit different than I expected as it seems to be a thicker fiber, almost a thin canvas texture. Even so, it is soft to the touch and the shape and drape of the top is as expected. I typically run a 22W in dressy clothing but experience tells me things from non-US sellers can run small so I ordered the 24W. I was wrong this time. The top is a tiny bit baggier than I’d like and I have to roll the top band of the pants down once to get the bagginess out of the seat and crotch area. I’m about 5’ 6.5” and the length with it rolled will allow me to wear flats. The black color is a true black and there is no transparency. So this brooch, though! Ugh. It’s a nice touch but it’s pretty much garbage as you can see in the photos. It’s craft grade plastic gems in flimsy metal prong seats along with some gold seed beads loosely sewn onto some black felt with a pin hot glued to the back of it. I wasn’t expecting some high quality jewels or anything but this is embarrassingly unwearable. Bottom line is the outfit is pretty good and I’d definitely recommend it, but don’t buy it expecting a fancy brooch since you’ll probably just throw that out like I did. Edit: I wore this all evening at my niece’s wedding. I danced a ton and was moving around all night in a warm venue. I bumped my rating up from the 4 stars I initially gave to 5 stars since this held up perfectly and it was very breathable and comfortable all evening. The wrinkles from shipping and washing came right out with a medium hot steam iron. I’m very pleased with my purchase and may end up looking for more colors!

At any rate they are amazingly comfortable and the material is very nice .

Beautiful Velvet Dress The velvet dress in Burnt Orange is gorgeous. The burnt orange color is very rich and will look beautiful especially during fall. I like how the dress accentuates my waist and the way the skirt falls in the front. I am 5'2", 140lbs, bust 37" and waist 31". According to the size chart I am a Large from the bust and XL from the waist. I ordered a Large and the dress is not tight from the waist but feels a little tight from the bust. The front opening is a little too deep for a curvy lady like me but wearing a thin cami will help; so far I haven't been wearing a cami but it makes me aware of the cleavage. I think that an XL will fit great, therefore I recommend sizing up if you are in between sizes. I wash the dress using a cold delicate cycle and allow it to air dry. I removed any wrinkles left by steaming it. The fabric still looks as new. The dress had a smell that was mostly gone after washing. I love this dress and I like how easy is to take care of it.

An elegant look and comfortable The wife really loves this Simplee Women Lace Formal Floral Maxi Dress, it is a comfortable to wear and elegant looking dress with a beautiful rich Burgandy color and a nice lace pattern that really makes this dress look great. She really like that there is a thick built in slip and that the V neck can be shortened via a button, which allows her the choice of revealing more or less depending on the mood she is in. The elastic waistband also makes this dress very comfortable and adds a slimming quality to the dress. The dress is long, and it is meant to be that way but might be to long for vertically challenged people as my wife is 5'3 and even with 3-inch heels on the bottom of the dress still hides her feet and almost drag the ground as she walks, she tells me she loves the dress so much she will just have to buy higher heels :)

I ordered a medium but almost wish I had gotten my usual small just because it does feel a little loose on the waist and could definitely stretch quite a bit to accommodate my bottom half (for reference, my measurements are 37/28/42 and I am 5'3" tall). The arm things do feel a little awkward, but I think it would be too hard to get on if they were smaller. The material is very smooth for a mesh overlay and feels very nice. I do think that the dress is longer than the product pictures make it look, but I am pretty short, so on me its not quite mini, but considering my age, probably not a bad thing.

Love/hate relationship There are things I both love and hate about this dress. For reference I’m a 4x in Torrid tops & dresses, 5’11.5” bra size 46C Loves: -length of the dress and sleeves (tall girl friendly!) -the v-neck (although a little deep for me, it looked fine with a broach holding it in place, and was still flattering even with it open) -the slits (I love how when I walk you can see a lot of leg-they did not open all the way while walking, only about lower to mid thigh) Hates: -the material FEELS fine, but it looks VERY cheap (to me the cost should be MUCH cheaper!) -the weird loops/extra material around the waistline; it’s not flattering, and I guess they want it to look like a wrap dress but it’s a fail. They would have been better off leaving the material as straps that you could wrap yourself! -it hugs my “apron” tummy too much! I even sized up so it was pretty big on me except for the fact that it CLUNG to my tummy My husband liked it on me so I’m going to try getting it altered to flatter my body better (and to close up the slits-see how high they are in one pic-to the top of my stomach!!!!) If the sleeveless dress goes on sale in another color I will try it, but I definitely would not purchase for the regular price! Not worth it!!!

The fit is very flattering There is a little color variation on the apricot colored dress but it is still very pretty. The dress is lined with a decent material so you aren’t able to see my nude colored undergarments but make sure that you wear skin colored undergarments because any other vibrant color will show through. I love the ruched material, it helps to hide all of your body flaws and make them less noticeable. It also has a lot of stretch to the material and is easy to put on and take off. This would make a great party or wedding guest dress. I would recommend it. I am wearing a size small and I am 5’3, 135 lbs and my measurements are 36D-27-36.

We did have to exchange 3 of the ones we ordered because they were too big but the seller was AMAZING and rushed them to us with plenty of time for the wedding! The dress is fully floor length, the two under 5'5" bridesmaids had to have them hemmed (which requires a skilled seamstress since it is not an easy task as there is a wide panel of stiffened fabric so the length lays well). Also, the shimmer is perfect. We were worried as one of the reviews said it wasn't that shimmery, but we were very pleased!

Elegant lines | Scrumptious fabric | Quality construction This “blue haze” colored gown is size 12 and matches my eye color perfectly. The fit of the bodice on me is almost perfect (my measurements are 39-1/2” bust, 33” waist, 39” hips). Its deep-cut v-neck works with my Victoria Secrets bra (wire-free Body by Victoria, size 34DDD). The dress lining gives the gown elegance as it moves around my shape. I will hand-stitch the bodice where the fabric crosses to ensure that the bodice pieces stay together and that where the shoulder seams meet my shoulder don’t slip off my shoulder. Zipper is hidden, and its pull-tab’s construction is sturdy, delicate-looking, exactly what one would expect on a quality garment. I plan to wear this gown to my daughter’s bestie’s evening November wedding activities so the short, ample-width “petal” sleeves give me some flexibility for the fickle weather Kansas offers in November (snow, rain, wind, or heat).

Very versatile, comfortable and sturdy dress! This black dress was perfect for my event. It looked classy without being uncomfortable. MATERIAL: The material wasn't thin or see through, had decent body to it. I will say the only thing that took away from the appeal was the slightly ribbed fabric, cheapens it a touch but acceptable for my event, I wouldn't wear the texture to a black tie formal event. FIT: I am 5'4 130lbs, semi-athletic build and a small was perfect. It came just over my knees and was fitted all the way down (not tubular and flared at the bottom like some weird dresses). When I first put it on it felt a little snug but the stretch was amazing and I stretched pulled on it a bit for more room in the hips/butt. The off the shoulder area was a little formfitting across my chest, and I do not have an exceptionally large chest (not draped across). The bodice fell nicely on my waist, and it was a classy length. I wore a strapless bra with one clear strap on the shoulder side of the dress. Overall, I would recommend this dress and may buy it in other colors!
