Nice fabric and cut This blouse is lightweight, 100% Polyester. Easy to wash & dry with no ironing needed. In fact, it came out of the packaging ready to wear with no wrinkles. I ordered this in BLACK, size MEDIUM. I normally wear a size Large, but I didn't want an oversized flowing look (as shown in the listing photo). For me (5' 7", 170lbs) this blouse in size medium fits me well for a fitted look. If you want an oversized flowing fit, you should order your true size. The black fabric is NOT see-thru or shear. The blouse can easily be worn as casual with jeans, or dressy with slacks or a skirt. There is a tag that says UPF 50+. As with most long sleeve polyester blouses, it should provide adequate sun protection. In summary, order your true size for a flowing fit. Order one size smaller for a more fitted look. If you are a minimalist, this blouse will serve many purposes in your closet and can easily be your one "go to" blouse!

Not bad. This Cooan sparkly dress is cute and mostly made well. I like the 'Navy Blue' color and the long slit sleeves. The sequins are evenly placed and that makes this dress look a little more high end. The inside of the dress is just soft enough to rest against my sensitive skin. It's not too scratchy.The Medium fits my 38C chest and 34" waist nicely. It's not too tight but it did almost give me a hint of that claustrophic feeling while putting this on since there's no buttons or zippers on this dress and the fabric doesn't have much stretch. Thankfully, it's easier for me to take off though.What I don't like is how this dress is just slightly see through. Why? This dress is even lined. Speaking of the lining, it ends about 3" or 4" above the skirt hem so those 3" or 4" are REALLY sheer as you can probably see in my pics and here with the product photos. Thankfully, the skirt still doesn't seem too short on my 5' 5" frame. It might be an issue for the taller peeps though.Overall, I like the look, fit and feel of this dress. I just wish it was a little more opaque and that the lining went all the way down.

It's not too tight but it did almost give me a hint of that claustrophic feeling while putting this on since there's no buttons or zippers on this dress and the fabric doesn't have much stretch. Thankfully, it's easier for me to take off though.What I don't like is how this dress is just slightly see through. Why? This dress is even lined. Speaking of the lining, it ends about 3" or 4" above the skirt hem so those 3" or 4" are REALLY sheer as you can probably see in my pics and here with the product photos. Thankfully, the skirt still doesn't seem too short on my 5' 5" frame. It might be an issue for the taller peeps though.Overall, I like the look, fit and feel of this dress. I just wish it was a little more opaque and that the lining went all the way down.

A cute, cold-shoulder jumpsuit for spring and summer. This Dokotoo jumpsuit is so cute! I chose the khaki in a size small, after viewing the provided size chart. The color pictured is accurate to what I received and the size is true to size. There is some horizontal stretch in the woven fabric, but basically no vertical stretch. The fabric is lightweight and breathable, and has a slight ripple look to it. On me, the jumpsuit is plenty big on top, so I’m thankful for the clear modesty snap at the bust. I found that tying the shoulder straps as tight as possible also helped with the fit. With the shoulder ties completely tied, a bit of my bra straps are visible on my shoulders, so I’ll either wear clear/translucent bra straps or a skin colored bra. There are nice sized pockets on each side, which are deep enough to conceal my entire hand or even a larger phone…mine is a iPhone 12 Pro and fits with room to spare. On my short waisted body, the multi stitched, smock waistband looks best positioned around my rib cage, rather than at my natural waist. If I pull it down to my actual waistline, the crotch hangs so low that it looks odd. Regardless, the length of the pants goes down to my ankles. All in all, the quality of the jumpsuit is good, with no notable construction issues. The cold shoulder design is a cute feature for the upcoming warmer months. The care tag states it’s 100% polyester and machine washable, so I followed my usual laundering process. I washed it in a delicates bag with cool water on the gentle cycle and then hung it on a drying rack to air dry. The jumpsuit looked like new after the laundering process. I think it looks as cute with flats as it does with heels. I think the price point is reasonable and like the variety of colors to choose from. I am pleased with it and would recommend it. For reference, my measurements are: Height - 5’4” Bust - 36” Waist - 30” Arm length - 22.5” Shoulder width - 15” Weight - 115# Inseam - 31”

Fits larger women and it’s stretchy This dress blew me out of the water! We were invited to a black tie wedding and this gal had nothing to wear. 5’4”. 330 lbs. is not a size you can find without paying a fortune at a specialty store. Enter this dress! I ordered size 28 and it fit great. A little long but that made it even more elegant! The fabric stretches and there is a built in slip, so no extra layers to fight with! The cape is attached and sewn at the end to cover the arms, which I liked. Would highly recommend. I took a chance and it paid back ten fold…. No fighting crowds in a store, trying on countless dresses that don’t fit only to feel defeated. If you are on the fence, buy it! You won’t be disappointed!

Gorgeous Dress! This dress came in good time.. about 3-5 business days after I ordered it. It’s a gorgeous deep red, and the material is stretchy and decently thick. It has gorgeous flow and movement to it. I ordered the medium, and I am 5’7”, 135 lbs, 32C chest. The only issue for me was that it was a little short, but do-able. I’ll just have to be careful. I put the dress on right out of the package and it was sort of loose, so I washed and dried it, and it fit perfectly snug on top. I don’t think I’ll need to wear a bra, although I might wear a strapless for a little more time protection, plus.. I think it will just look better. I think it’s very versatile and absolutely adorable. You get what you pay for, and this honestly is a good buy!

Beautiful classic old-school/retro dress design This dress captured my attention due to its classic 1950s and 60s retro look. It reminded my of the dresses my grandmother's would wear to church, shopping downtown or to one of their club luncheons. The style of the dress is classic with a squared off neckline, short flared sleeves and a full flared skirt. The dress comes in 4 colors, I ordered the medium (US 8-10) in the airy blue color, which is a perfect baby blue color. The dress is lined, which made it a bit snug in the bodice area for me. I am 5'6, 150 lbs and am larger on the top than on the bottom. Because of the lining, I could have ordered a large, but I feared it would be to loose. As long as you know your size when a dress has a lining, you cannot go wrong with this dress; it runs true to size. The dress material is 95% polyester & 5% elastane. The lining material is 98% polyester & 2% Viscose. So, the dress does have some streetch and give to accommodate for the lining, which also has some streetch. When I tried the dress on, it fell about 2 inches below my knees and it was about 42 inches long from the top of the shoulder to the bottom of the skirt of the dress. The skirt of the dress has nice deep pockets on the sides. I really enjoy a dress with deep pockets. The dress should be washed in cold water and dried flat. One nice touch was the tag on this 5 star dress from the designer to the customer, although the syntax was a bit off, the request for feedback and the overall sentiment and look of the tag was quite positive. The tag ended with the following statement: "Have a nice day!"

This dress is the bomb!! This dress comes simply in a zipper clothing bag. The material is thick satin but a medium shine, which makes it look gorgeous. The drape on the material is perfect because it is a heavier material. The thickness definitely hides bumps but I cannot speak for the lighter shades offered. I am mid aged, approx size 12/14, about 5" 6", pear shaped and lots of bumps. This draped on and while I definitely need good smooth shaper type under garment, even without it I can get by. There is something about the cut that just works. BTW I am pear shaped and weight wise I'd say I am pudgy but average. I may shake off a few pounds before the weddings I have in the spring but this dress is so gorgeous I cannot wait to go. Because the midi length and nice drape, this dress would work for any black dress event, even luncheon and I tried to demonstrate that with a simple black/white jacket. Just gorgeous, I couldn't be happier.

AMAZING dress, perfect for my nuptials!!! This dress could not have been more perfect for our elopement nuptials. It is sassy, classy, sweet, and sexy at the same time. And the details on this thing are so intricate and beautiful! I have gotten and am still receiving SO many compliments on this dress! My measurements are 41-35-45, 186 pounds, and the Large fit perfectly. The dress has very good stretch, so it should work if you’re a bit bigger than I am. I actually ordered the XL too, just in case, and it did fit okay, but it didn’t hug my curves the way the Large does. The zipper did hang just a little in the back, but it was not enough to detract from the rest of the look. I added a silver and rhinestone brooch to the waistline, also purchased on Amazon. I didn’t want a whole sash because I don’t favor the look of the tied back, and the only brooch I loved had a weak pin, so I sewed it to the dress, and it worked out great. This dress is so easy as well as beautiful. I just pulled it on without even unzipping it, although I was careful about the sleeves. I didn’t want the ordeal of stretching and struggling to get the zipper up, mainly because my arms are a bit big, and I didn’t want to risk tearing it while stretching. I did use a shaper underneath. The dress material is not very thick, so if a shaper is used, you have to make sure it fits your body almost perfectly so that it doesn’t make the dress look misshapen. I used one from David’s Bridal, also purchased via Amazon. I had bought three other expensive dresses for when we were planning a big wedding, and I had actually chosen this one as a reception dress. Before we canceled the big wedding, I was seriously considering this as my main ceremony dress because I loved it that much. I will STILL wear this as my reception dress when we have that. I’ll probably post more pics lol. This was my dream dress, and I still can’t believe my dream dress was less than $40. Would recommend to anyone, whether on a budget or not. I can’t wait to wear this dress again at our reception, and it’s even budget-friendly enough to buy another one if the sidewalk dirt doesn’t come out. Forgot to mention, my husband LOVED me in this dress too, which meant a lot to me. Not a single complaint. Absolutely love it!

Absolutely amazing fit! This dress couldn’t have been a more perfect fit. For reference I’m 5’5” and 150 lb, and a 34DDD. The length worked for both a chunky heel and, later in the evening, flip flips. The color becomes a more vivid dark blue outside in natural light. Highly recommend this!

This dress definitely runs small! I am 225 lbs and normally wear a 2XL. I ordered a 3XL based on the size chart, and it is even still a little too small. The material is pretty thick, which is good. But it is so tight on me that you can see my nipples through the lined top and you can also see where the bosom lining ends and where my slip shorts waistband is. No, it does not have a line under the boobs-- that's just a fold in the material because it is too tight and so it rides up like that. It is also not machine washable according to the tag, though I washed it and hung it dry with no problems. But really it's a fairly flattering cut. If it were just a little bit bigger, I'd probably love this dress.

It looks more casual than what I would wear to a wedding except for the leg slit which is high on me because of my height. If I raise my arms it really gets high. The fabric looks like worn t-shirt material and this is the reason I say it is more causal looking. The surface has a fuzzy finish to it right out of the package. Construction is good, seams are all sewn and there aren't a ton of loose thread tails. For reference I got the XL and I am 40/35/39, 6 feet tall and 192 pounds. All in all, this is an inexpensive dress that fits me well and is comfortable but I won't wear it to a wedding. It would be better for an evening on the town.

Makes my rack look fantastic! This dress from Dokotoo is very flattering to my bustline. The wrapped, twisted style accentuates the bust, while concealing the belly area. I am 5’4, pear shaped, 155lbs, and 36b. The hemline is a good length for me, but the sleeves are a bit too long. Made in China from 65% polyester, 30% viscose, and 5% elastane, the manufacturer recommends machine washing and line drying. To protect the fabric, I washed this inside a zippered mesh garment bag in cold water, then I hung it to dry. It washed up nicely and didn’t even need ironing. This is an easy wear, easy care dress that can be worn casually with canvas sneakers and a denim jacket, or dressier with a pair of heels or sexy boots. I am shown wearing the wine color option in a size large. I probably could have gotten away with a medium. If you are between sizes, I would err on the smaller side as the dress is generously cut. Overall, it's a great versatile dress, oh and it's got pockets!

I think she looks great in it… This dress has an inner lining that goes down to the knees, so you don’t have to wear a slip. It’s a thin, cool material, so it can be used as a spring-summer dress, but it’s not so thin that it’s see-through or feels cheaply made. It’s a solid, so it does require some “dressing up” with a piece of jewelry such as a necklace or an attractive belt. Otherwise it might look matronly (that’s why it’s a 4 star). The sleeves have a mild “poof,” and they are elastic but are not tight. My wife ordered a medium. She’s usually a medium, but rarely a large. And she requested the black dress because she feels that black is slimming. She’s 5’3 1/2” tall, so you can try to gauge the length from the attached photos. On her, the dress comes down nearly to the ankles. To put the dress on, she simply slipped it over her head and did not need to undo the button. She washed it in cold water, permanent press cycle, and hung it to dry without any issues.

It has potential This dress has potential, because the material is silky and pretty and it is made well enough. I ordered the purple, but honestly it looks closer to mauve. The dress zips down the back for you to step into, and then you need someone to zip it up. For me, I ordered a size small. It fits up top, but my hips do not lie in this thing. It’s skin type and not flattering. My rear looks like it’s squeezed into a sausage casing. Oddly, I like the dress anyway, just not on me. If you are shaped differently, with regular sized or small hips, this dress would possibly look very attractive. I do have to point out that this dress is cut slightly different than the advertised photo too. The arms are deeply cut into the chest area. In other words, you show off your shoulders and part of your chest. If you know how a “muscle shirt” is cut deeply like an extreme tank top, then you may know what I mean by this. Again: if I had a very cute figure, it would not matter and would likely be a great looking dress. The neckline is cute and clean looking, the lines are nice, the length is perfect, since it falls to the knee and isn’t way too short. This dress is very sexy if you have the body for it. Don’t even think about trying this if you have body parts that need to be camouflaged or hidden. I’m 52 years old. I look very cute in certain clothes that flatter me. This dress does not flatter me. If I were toned like I used to be, it would be probably be game on. As it is, I am not planning on wearing it, though, because the days of being able to flaunt my figure are over. To sum up my review: this dress is amazing, but revealing and unforgiving. Also, it wrinkles easily and a lot, but a steamer works wonders. You could wear this dress to a wedding, out dancing, to a nice social event, or even to church. Just be aware that it isn’t for everyone.

You could wear this dress to a wedding, out dancing, to a nice social event, or even to church. Just be aware that it isn’t for everyone.

It has potential This dress has potential, because the material is silky and pretty and it is made well enough. I ordered the purple, but honestly it looks closer to mauve. The dress zips down the back for you to step into, and then you need someone to zip it up. For me, I ordered a size small. It fits up top, but my hips do not lie in this thing. It’s skin type and not flattering. My rear looks like it’s squeezed into a sausage casing. Oddly, I like the dress anyway, just not on me. If you are shaped differently, with regular sized or small hips, this dress would possibly look very attractive. I do have to point out that this dress is cut slightly different than the advertised photo too. The arms are deeply cut into the chest area. In other words, you show off your shoulders and part of your chest. If you know how a “muscle shirt” is cut deeply like an extreme tank top, then you may know what I mean by this. Again: if I had a very cute figure, it would not matter and would likely be a great looking dress. The neckline is cute and clean looking, the lines are nice, the length is perfect, since it falls to the knee and isn’t way too short. This dress is very sexy if you have the body for it. Don’t even think about trying this if you have body parts that need to be camouflaged or hidden. I’m 52 years old. I look very cute in certain clothes that flatter me. This dress does not flatter me. If I were toned like I used to be, it would be probably be game on. As it is, I am not planning on wearing it, though, because the days of being able to flaunt my figure are over. To sum up my review: this dress is amazing, but revealing and unforgiving. Also, it wrinkles easily and a lot, but a steamer works wonders. You could wear this dress to a wedding, out dancing, to a nice social event, or even to church. Just be aware that it isn’t for everyone.

Fits just how you want it! This dress has pretty good material with a good amount of stretch. It fits snug and keeps an excellent shape! I am 5’ 7, 145 pounds and I ordered a size medium and it fits perfectly!

Very comfortable and beautiful. This dress has soft breathable material that is not clingy. I love the chest area, I did put a small sewing tack so it would stay closed. That is just a personal preference. It probably didn't need that, but I was wearing it to work and I lift and move a lot at work and didn't want to chance showing too much off to my co-workers. LOL It is the perfect length for me. Not so short that I feel like I will show everything when I bend over and not to long to make it look like a moo moo dress either. I am a very curvy lady. I'm 5'5 and weight approximately 263lbs. My bra size is 44DD. I ordered my size which is a 24. Fits beautifully and I will probably buy it in another color.

Flattering & form fitting but extremely see thru This dress hugs every curve! It is so flattering and sexy, conforming to every part of your body. Large fit me perfectly & I am 5’4 (I tried it on with 3 inch heels) and have an hour glass shape. I hesitated between three and four stars but ultimately gave it four stars because although the fit is stretchy and very complimentary, the material is so thin and see-through I couldn’t even post any of the full body pictures I took. In the sun or in direct light, you will show everything you were born with unless you are used to wearing spanx or slips under your dresses (which I am not used to doing). I have hidden tattoos & they were all visible with this dress. The picture I uploaded is of my thigh and you can see how thin the material is, my skin color is visible through the material. Then only way I can wear this dress is if I buy a full body black slip to go with it otherwise it’s just going to sit in my closet. Wish it was a better quality material so I could give this 5 stars but sadly I could not.

Gorgeous! This dress hugs in all the right places with just enough stretch to conform to your body...but also enough tightness to suck you in! I'm 5"6....310lbs..... bra size 44i...and normally a size 20 dress. I ordered a 3XL and it was a JUST perfect fit. The straps on the dress tighten and loosen. I tightened mine alot in order to hold my breast in place. I did not wear a bra and they were secure. There is a long zipper going down the side that was very hard to zip back up even with help. So I recommend keeping it zipped, step into it from the top of the dress, and shimmy it up your body.

This is a beautiful dress with a great fit! I have an athletic body type at 5’8” and about 170 This dress is a beautiful color as shown and a very flattering fit. I ended up cutting out the shear piece across the v-line neckline and easily hand sewed it together for a more modest look for our daughter’s wedding. I loved this dress and had many compliments. I have an athletic body type at 5’8” and about 170lbs and wore a size 12.

Very lightweight and flowy This dress is a beautiful wardrobe addition for hot summer events. The off white is lighter than the product photos which look more lighter beige-- it truly is ivory in real life. Because of that, I could see this dress being great for a bridal shower or similar. The fabric is very light and airy. This dress is perfect for sweltering summer heat, especially with the addition of the side slits. The skirt is half lined because of the slits and, while you can see the under skirt cutoff through the white fabric, the lining is absolutely opaque. I wore dark undergarments in my review images and you can't see them at all. I'm a size 10, 32DD, and ordered the medium. It flows really nicely and it wouldn't be a problem if it were to shrink a little in the wash. At 5'10, the dress is lower-mid calf length on me, just a little shorter than the product photos (which I predicted and am happy with). If you are shorter, it will likely be a true maxi dress.

Great Material & Fit, Lacks Comfort This dress is a great value for the price; it has a nice sturdy, snatching material, but it is not the most comfortable near the boob/arm pit area. However, if you can get past the discomfort of that silicone gripper the dress hugs in all the right places and is a strong enough material to pull you in and not be see through. 5’7” 160 lbs, 34 DD, with a little bit of a pooch from recently having a baby and I chose a Medium based on other reviews. Could have worn a large, but I don’t think it would have tucked me in as well as the medium did, and it was big enough to hold “the girls” in place. Wore the dress for 10 hours and survived. Buy the dress. Update: accidentally washed and dried this “dry clean only” dress and it still looks great.

Beautiful dress with serious quirks This dress is a lovely material and style, but the way-too-long train made it a no-go. I also think a smaller or hidden zipper & dropping the waist a couple of inches to the belly button would be more flattering. I’m 5’6” 132 lbs 34-36B & size 6 fit well. Amazon recommended size 8, but it was too loose.

Beautiful but perhaps not for large busts This dress is a lovely silky fabric and has a lovely flow. I wore this in Vegas and it was perfect for 100 degree heat. The midriff is comfy when eating and walking a lot and the slit is sexy but manageable (I’m 5’9). It’s more cleavage than I usually show, but it’s Vegas lol. However. The tie knot is a risky move with a large bust, especially after having 2 kids (iykyk). Even with stick on bra cups I was showing way more underboob than I wanted. But since I liked the dress a lot I ended up tying it as tight as I could, then I tucked the ends of the ties into the keyhole, spread them out to cover the hole, then sewed them down around the edges. So yes it negated the cute keyhole look, but it worked for me.
Love This dress is a medium, I’m 5’2 160lbs, and it fits great of course a little long but with heels or tie like I did. Really cute FYI both vest and dress from Amazon.

Beautiful and Elegant Dress This dress is a must have!!! This dress shows all the curves, fits just right. The lace is gorgeous but, the dress underneath is very short. I thought since I am 5’0 I would be ok. But my assets made it a tad bit too short. I received compliments all night. Seriously ladies get you one.

These curves don't lie! This dress is a new favourite because of the cut and fit! It is a true surplice so you can have a 42-32-40 figure and have those curves accommodated. The size chart is very accurate. The material makes it glide more than hug even if it is wonderfully bodycon! The ruching is flattering and the cross-over centre has a modesty panel so it isn't too revealing. The dress hit just above my knee on a 5'7" frame with a 32" inseam. You will want to give it a light steam out of the package and it is the sort of material that will show any bump of any undergarment. It isn't thick, but it is substantial and opaque. There's plenty of stretch and the colour is lovely without any shine. Which is all to say that this is a dress that will let you show off your curves. 5 definite stars.

SO Beautiful & Great Quality! I Love it! This dress is absolutely beautiful! I feel so gorgeous in it and better yet, it seems like excellent quality for a very fair, reasonable price! To start and as mentioned, the dress is wonderful quality.. the top fabric is sheer and has a light airy quality to it and the underlining is soft and keeps the dress from being see through. I wouldn’t wear black or bright colored undergarments under it but i had no issues with it being see through and it doesn’t require a slip. The lining does a great job showing off the top layer with the pattern too. The pattern is so pretty.. I absolutely love the gold dots on the white! So classy and elegant! Also the dress came looking perfect, no loose seams or threads and the stitching is done very well. The fit is really pretty and this fit true to size for me.. in fact it was the perfect fit despite my size going between XS and Small. I am 5’5 and about 120lbs so i wear XS to Small..I ordered a small.. some smalls can be a little baggy for me but this fit perfectly. There is a tie behind the neck that allows for a little adjustment.. I like that it ties instead of buttons, the tie looks nicer in my opinion and is much easier. This also has a beautiful style.. the top and sleeves are very complementing and the skirt flares out and flows beautifully. Overall i LOVE this dress! It’s so versatile too.. i can easily wear this for a casual look with a cute hat and sandals or add some sophisticated jewelry and heels for a more refined, formal look.. the possibilities with this are great! I absolutely recommend this! It’s gorgeous, well made, great materials and is very comfortable! Definitely worth the reasonable price!

This dress is magical! This dress is AMAZING! I bought it on a whim for fun for formal night on a cruise, choosing the champagne color because it was on sale and just hoping for the best. I was BLOWN AWAY when it arrived. I am 5'3" and ~130 pounds with 32G bra size, so fit can be difficult. The size 6 with the corset fit perfectly so I could adjust to my figure! I didn't even have to have it shortened once I added a hoop skirt and some heels. The champagne color was very pretty - more a pale yellow than the photo, but I won't argue with Belle vibes! I would note that in certain lighting, it came across as ivory and a number of people thought it was a wedding dress. The only thing I would caution is if you are buying a wire hoop skirt for underneath - at certain angles, you could see the wire hoops because the skirt is delicate. If I didn't have to pack it for travel, I may consider buying a different kind of underskirt that would have more layers for volume than wires. That said, even with the wire skirt, it was beautiful and I got lots of compliments and felt like a princess! :) Great find!

Cruisewear This dress is beautiful and just sparkly enough for an upcoming cruise's formal night. The bottom underskirt is about 6-8" shorter than the tuile layer, so you can easily "hem it" to the right length by just cutting the netting to the right length. The black is too long and will need 3-4 inch heels (I am 5’5”)I will probably keep both dresses since they are such a great price.

Review of Long Mock Dress size 8 Petite in Wedgewood Blue This dress is beautiful. I am 57, and this hides figure bumps and bulges. It is so comfortable, stays in place while dancing and working at a wedding as mother of bride. Got many complements that seemed genuine. The blue is a bit hard to tell what color it is. This outdoor photo captures it best. I am 5'. I wore 3 inch wedge heels. The dress just skimmed the floor. I am no seamstress, I can barely sew, but I was able to tack up the waist in the front underneath the top part to make the front just a tiny bit shorter, Maybe one inch shorter, by sticking up 3 spots. Then the length was perfect. Not scratchy at all. Hides all bra straps. Nothing hangs out on top. Is pretty good quality, does not look cheap. All the seams held together well. When I spilled a drink on the bottom, it dried very fast on it's own and didn't leave much of a mark. There is not one thing that I did not like about this dress. It was a perfect dress for me. I had ordered many others and chose this one.

It does have some give and stretch in the main body of the dress, but not in the sheer part up top, so it’s a little uncomfortable for me up there with my broad shoulders, but not enough to be a deal breaker. I’m 5’6 and the dress just brushes the floor barefoot, which is perfect for me since I plan to wear flats, but if you’re tall or want extra length for heels, you might not like the length. The quality for the price is excellent. It’s not the nicest fabric in the world, but it’s still plenty nice. The gold embroidery is a lot more detailed in person and very beautiful. Overall I’m very happy with my purchase.

Flattering, works for pregnancy/nursing This dress is good quality. The fabric is nice. It is soft and comfortable and somewhat stretchy, and it’s thick enough that it doesn’t show every bump and lump underneath. It’s not at all see-through. The color is a little bit different than in the listing photos. It’s less neutral, and a little bit more camel colored and warm toned. It does run a little bit small in the chest and arms. If you’re normally in between sizes, size up. The length is midi length if you’re average height- it hits just below the knees on me (5’7”). The dress is also great for pregnancy and postpartum. It’s stretchy enough to fit comfortably even in the third trimester, and the crossover neckline is perfect for nursing moms. It is a little low-cut, but that’s easily solved with a camisole if it bothers you. And it drapes nicely over the tummy area, making flattering for anyone who is self-conscious about their midsection.

Gorgeous Dress! This dress is gorgeous and so unique! I love the look and feel of it! The champaign color is as pictured and looks better in person. The draping layer of the mermaid cut gives a cute flirty feel. The top of the dress is a bit big in the sense of material. It could have been trimmed for a more fitted and flattering look. For reference, my measurements are Bust-waist-hips: 39”-32.5”-43” inches and I am wearing a size medium.

Stunning one-of-a-kind dress, but be prepared to alter This dress is gorgeous and so unique! I wore it to a wedding rehearsal dinner and got so many compliments. It did require a lot of tailoring, but I'm 5'11' and curvy so that was pretty expected. I contacted the seller before I purchased and asked if they could add more length, and they were able to do that without any issue. However, the chest and shoulders were too short for me, but once I got it altered it was perfect. And the seller was so kind and ! The corset-style bodice is really supportive except that it is meant to lace up way past your waist, so I ended up tying it right below my waist and letting the ribbons hang to cover up the rest of the eyelets. The v neck is gorgeous, but I did use some dress tape just to make sure everything stayed where it was supposed to be, lol. Overall I recommend it, and I only dropped one star because I did spend the price of the dress to alter it. But it's definitely an investment since I can't wait to rewear as many times as possible!

This dress is gorgeous and the sizing is accurate. ... This dress is gorgeous and the sizing is accurate to the size chart. I ordered 3 different size/colors to try on with Amazon Wardrobe: blush in size 10, and taupe in sizes 10 and 12. Two of the dresses arrived with missing beading/sequins on the back near the zipper, both in the same place even (about a centimeter of the beading was missing). Unfortunately the one I wanted to keep (blush size 10) was one of the damaged dresses but I contacted Amazon customer service and they were able to issue a credit to my account for the inconvenience since I decided I wanted to keep the dress anyway. I'm 5'2" and ~145lbs (36" bust, 28" waist, 40" hip), and the size 10 is damn near perfect on me. It's a little long even with heels (no surprise at my height) but I should be able to just have the straps shortened (not the bottom of the dress) to make it work. They do send extra beads/sequins so I'll be having the small damaged area repaired as well.

Plus size looks great! This dress is gorgeous on. The wrap feature is actually useful and not just for looks, so you can tighten it loosen the waist, depending on what you prefer. I am just under 5'10" and 280lbs, holding most of my weight in my lower stomach/gut area, and I ordered this dress in a 22 (when it came, it said 3x) and it was a perfect fit. The price point is also great for such a well made dress. I wore this to a wedding, but also plan to wear it for family pictures, so it is definitely versatile and worth the money. I gave it 4/5 stars because it could ALWAYS be better. For me, with a small chest, the button to keep it closed could have been higher. If you have a larger chest, the button will be in the right spot for you.

Gorgeous dress! This dress is gorgeous! The material is soft and good quality, the hi-low design moves beautifully and is very flattering. I love the elastic band around the middle, it’s very forgiving and gives you more options with sizing. I am 5’4” 125 lbs and wore a Small in the wine color and it was perfect. The color is true to the stock photo (it photographs a little lighter than it is in my pic). I did wear a slip under the dress because it’s just a tiny bit sheer depending on the lighting and was more for my own comfort than necessity. I personally prefer a modest dress that doesn’t need to be fussed with a lot so I added a tiny stitch to the closure at the bust to keep it from sliding around and it’s perfect! (If you know how to thread a needle you can have it done in 30 seconds. You’ll just have to be mindful that the stitch is there when putting on/taking off but it was no trouble) Yes, it did arrive wrinkled but you’re getting a dress in the mail…there’s no way for the company to prevent that from happening with this fabric. It ironed out easily and looks great! I’m not much of a dress girl but I will definitely re-wear this one and probably order other colors as well!

BUY IT!!! (May need to buy more than once for fit) This dress is GORGEOUS!! I will say I ordered the samd dress several times until I found one that fit me well. I ordered a small every time & each time it fit differently or the pattern was printed differently on the top (the beads were off-center & didn't cover all of the fabric evenly on the chest, for instance). I'm barely 5'0", about 107lbs, 34DD, & the small was at first too too long on the top. I'm used to hemming length & taking in straps on top, but this was just too big. Finding a smaller "small" helped a lot. For those who are bustier, this actually covered me well, but definitely wear pasties! I took up the top for more bust support & also slightly sewed the V at the bottom because I'm petite & it looked weird without cleavage. I also pinned the bottom because even in 3" heels I couldn't walk without holding it up/stepping on it. The back doesn't have a clasp/hooks above the zipper. I didn't have any problems with the zipper coming undone, but I threw extra pins in my purse thinking it might. I bought this dress for a black tie NYE event & got tonsss of compliments (I was surprised how many women actually went out of their way to compliment me)!! Buy it, try it, then go strut your stuff -- you can't help but feel glamorous & sexy in this dress!!

Beautiful dress but high bust seam This dress is gorgeous. It reminds me of something that would have been worn during the renaissance. My only complaint is that the seam under the bust is too high. It doesn’t sit under the bust as advertised. A friend of mine got the same dress and the seam was too high on her as well and we have completely different body shapes. Also this is not thick authentic velvet. You can see thru it under the light and you definitely need warm undergarments with it. I got mine in red and the color was gorgeous. Like a wine or garnet red. Im 5’5 and I typically wear a size 14. I got the large and i still had a little room. The sleeves are not at all tight. Plenty of room to move. This dress feels like a nightgown. It’s great for the price.

Beautiful dress, feels expensive This dress is gorgeous. Nobody would believe you got it online for under $100! The color was a little more orangey-red than the ruby-red in the picture, but still so so pretty. The top is heavy and feels expensive and well-made. The bra strap is secure. The sequins didn’t rub my bare arms too terribly in 3 hours of wear. This would be a gorgeous wedding dress in white! 2020: I’m sooo sad because it’s too small and I don’t have time to re-order. I’m 5’2” 179, pear shape, ordered a 16. I wear a 14 pants or a size large swing dress. This dress fits the chest perfectly but I can’t lace it loosely enough to fit at the waist. The flap of fabric behind the laces leaves skin exposed if you’re too wide for the dress. I also got a 6 hoop skirt to put under it which really makes it a dream. With low heels it barely drags on the ground. You won’t be disappointed in the quality of this dress. But I’d definitely go up a size or two if you’re a plus size like me. 2021 - Now I’m 150lb and size 10-12. It fit beautifully this year in a size 14. If in doubt order a size or two bigger because the corset waist can make it smaller but you can’t make it bigger. I just wish that the flap behind the ties was a little bigger. I recommend a good corset for your hips/abdomen. If your dress is pulled tight, any belly you’ve got will be pushed down and it’ll push the dress out a bit. Definitely get a hoop skirt for a stunning, full look!

Fits for the ‘little black dress’ category! This dress is great! I was looking for a little black dress that could also pass for semi professional looking. Starting with measurements I am 160lb and 5’7”, typically wearing a DD bra. This dress fits the bill for me; the length is longer for a shorter dress so I feel like it would be appropriate for a dressier work event. The dress doesn’t have sleeves but the straps are thick enough that a bra strap wouldn’t be a problem at all. I also really love the fit, it’s flattering and shows my curves but also isn’t skin tight like some other dresses. The little ruffle on the side is also perfect to hide my little mom pouch that I am forever trying to get rid of but can’t. You would feel 100% comfortable and sexy in this dress. The material is also thicker so since it’s black and thicker I wouldn’t worry at all about it being see though, it also does have some stretch to it. I say if you’re wanting a dress that will make you feel sexy but also hold some modesty at the same time this is perfect!

Size LARGE on 5’7”, 168lbs, 34C body This dress is great!! The only reason I didn’t give 5 stars is because the fabric isn’t soft. It’s kinda itchy (but not to the point where I won’t wear the dress). FIT: For reference, I’m 5’7”, 168 lbs, 34C chest. This green dress is a size Large. It’s a little roomy in the tummy area, which I like (I have a hormonal belly, and it doesn’t squeeze me too tight, which is nice). The chest fit PERFECT! I could *probably* squeeze into a medium, which I ordered in a different color, but I haven’t received the medium yet. UPDATE: The medium was way too small, and bunched up near the zipper (above my booty) because it was too tight. COLOR: The color is exactly what I expected. Deep green without making me look like a Christmas tree. This color would be PERFECT on a redhead! STYLE: I’m not usually a big ruffles fan, but this dress is great. I’m not too body-confident, but this dress style makes me feel amazing! The ruffled arms make it look fancy schmancy, without being too over-the-top.

Comfort, Elegance, Classical, and Sexy! This dress is INCREDIBLE! It’s comfortable, stretchy, and so so sexy! It was the VERY FIRST dress I ordered for this special event (photos) and it fit perfectly! I was so shocked! I ordered a large and it was perfect! Like, absolutely perfect! I have a smaller chest but larger thighs and booty. I wrote pasties just in case the girls briefly escaped, but they stayed in place very well! No undergarments were worn! I wore 8” heels and my dress very lightly brushed the ground. I’m 5’7” for reference. There’s absolutely NOTHING I can complain about! BUY IT! I plan on getting a few more colors! I also saw some women wearing the straps a bit different so it wasn’t a crossbody but just two traditional over the shoulder straps, but the way the dress is sewed, that didn’t work the best for me. It would be cool if there was a small hook-eye closure so you can go back and forth between the two styles but for the money, I can’t complain! I got compliments allllll night!

beautiful but fits tight This dress is incredibly beautiful. I love the floral pattern and the lightweight fabric; it feels high quality. I also like the ruffles. However, I don't think this dress was made for childbearing women. The bust is too high, made for perky tits that have never breastfed. The fabric has no give or stretch in it, so I could barely zip it up around my postpartum belly and nursing breasts. There are adjustable straps, but they don't adjust long enough for me. I had to wear a strapless, push-up bra to get my boobs to fit right in the dress. Even then, it is not a perfect fit. I am 125 lbs, 5'4" and 2 months postpartum, and I ordered small. I wish I ordered medium. I hope this dress fits me better as I lose more baby weight and stop nursing. It is still flattering nevertheless.

So flattering! This dress is incredibly comfortable and flattering. Purchased a size Small (5'4", 117lbs). Loved it so much that I bought the white and black.

Pretty, Flowy, Practically Perfect This dress is incredibly comfortable! I read the reviews throughly and took the advice to go up a size from what you normally wear. For reference, I’m currently 5’6” 120lbs with a 34” bust and wear a medium is most clothes. I ordered this dress in a large and am so glad I did, as the sleeve length is perfect and the waistband is snug when you put the dress on. I’d keep that in mind when you order yours since it does not have a zipper and the snug waistband has to go over your shoulders and bust. In the picture I am standing in bare feet and I intend to bring the hem up a bit so I can wear the dress with flats for an event we are attending. I generally wear my clothes more loose fitting, so this size was perfect. The material is very soft, surprisingly lightweight, hangs comfortably, and flows nicely. I’ll admit it made me want to twirl around when I tried it on.

STUNNING! This dress is INSANELY BEAUTIFUL! Upon unpackaging you can immediately tell the quality is impeccable, making the price point completely acceptable. While the dress is heavy (due to the design), I never found it uncomfortable or difficult to move around in. At 5'6' and 155lbs, I purchased a size 10 and I can say that this dress seems to run on the smaller/longer side. However, it was perfect with heels. Nothing but compliments all night at our work event. Take a chance, you won't be disappointed!

LOVE IT!!! This dress is IT folx! It's the perfect combo of sexy and classy, and is guaranteed to make heads turn. The rouching is so flattering, and this rose color is everything! The material does have some good stretch to it, so if you order a size down, it will more than likely fit, and if you order a size up, you wouldn't be able to tell that it was too big because of the rouching. My measurements are 34dd-28-40, 5'3, 135 lbs, and I ordered a small. I absolutely adore this dress!

Excellent dress for short woman This dress is it. I needed a dress for a wedding. I hate buying dresses. They never fit my 5’ 0 frame especially with the extra chunk I have going on after having a kid and too many lockdown snacks. I basically bought a whole bunch of colors in medium and large to see what fit. Oddly, the mediums fit in the long sleeve version and large fit in the short sleeve. The long sleeve dress is longer in the front. Idk why but it is. I personally went with the short sleeve ones Bc the long sleeve was a lot of fabric for my frame and made me look bigger, plus I live in Florida so it wouldn’t really have been practical. There is definitely variation in the size you get. Some were perfect, some a lil big. I’d rather have a lil bigger so I can alter if needed. The blue color was underwhelming so I returned. The green and brown (more camel) we’re my favorites. I also kept the black and the red polka dot. I made the red one a short sleeve dress. It does not come that way. For those saying it is too short you can certainly put it on inside out and pinch the sides of the skirt part into a small triangle and sew a little bit to take in and it will be longer.

Perfect occasion dress This dress is pretty impressive. The quality is great! It's not thin whatsoever, and unlike some cheaper dresses, this comes with an underlay to keep all your unmentionables un-noticed. The fabric is pretty thick and soft as well. The color is your standard navy, which is great because it's won't be hard to coordinate other colors with it. I'm 5'4 and the length was just below my knees. As far as sizing goes its a little complicated. In my case since most of my weight is carried in my midsection and hips, those were the measurements I paid the closest attention to. According to their measurement guide, I was between a size 20 and 22. I didn't want to risk the dress being too small(I needed it for an upcoming wedding) so I ordered the 22. The fabric actually ended up having some stretch to it, so I could've went with my normal size or simply sized up to the 20. I do think that the 18 would've given a more tighter fit, which I wasn't looking for, so when I go back and order this in black, I'm going to go for the size 20. This dress is a zip-up style, but there is stretch within that part of the dress as well. I am super impressed with the quality and overall look of this dress. I absolutely cannot wait to purchase this in black!

Size down This dress is pretty, nice material and has stretch. I typically wear a medium ( curvy/athletic build) 168lbs 5'3.5 but I could've got a small (may have been slightly tight in the hip, but again has stretch) it's comfortable, flattering and I would purchase again.

It's alright. This dress is pretty! Looks just like the pic, although the "sequin" isn't very sparkly and really isn't sequins, so if you're looking for sparkly, this isn't it. The fabric does have a good bit of stretch and it's soft and comfortable. The fit is a little on the small side, for my preference, but is true to their size chart. I think it's a very flattering shape and fit overall. The ruffle sleeves are great for hiding your arms and the a-line waist is great for hiding that stubborn mom pooch. I'd still wear shapewear underneath though, but that's just personal preference. I do wish the length was a tad bit shorter. Falling just below the knee just does nothing for the legs, in my opinion. That said, it's a very modest dress, so it's perfect if that's what you're after. Overall, it's not exactly the style for me but it's good quality and a good value. For reference, I am 5'7, 185lbs, size 14 or L/XL and I got the XL.

Great Dress! This dress is really great! I wore it for my senior pictures, and they came out great. It's very flattering, especially since you can tie the ribbons around your waist to be as tight or loose as you want. Like a lot of other reviews have mentioned, the chest area is bigger, so if you have big breasts, you'll be good. I had to safety pin the top closed to keep my bra from showing. I normally wear a large, and that is the size I ordered. Once I did the safety pin, the rest of the sizing was great. Some people were mentioning how short it was. I'm 5'10 and didn't have any issues with it being too short. Be mindful of how you bend down, but to me, that's a normal rule of thumb with a dress. The dress is really flattering, a beautiful color, and very comfortable. It's not too hot, but it's great for fall weather. I highly recommend it, especially for the price!

Lovely dress This dress is really lovely but the first time I went to put the belt on the dress the thin piece of thread that held the belt to the dress broke off. So nice! This dress is really nice! It’s a satin but it is lined so while that adds some weight, it holds better structure and doesn’t cling- aka doesn’t not accentuate your insecure areas. For example I sometimes have a problem with dresses this style or satin because I’m insecure about my lower belly but this material does not cling around it. The dress is entirely held up by tying around your neck which makes me slightly nervous but I do like the open back so much especially the flattering droop under the waist. The rose pink color is gorgeous as well, and the leg slit is to die for! It came a little wrinkled so I plan to steam it and then it should be good to go! It is just above hitting the ground for me and I’m 5’5 but I think it’ll still look nice in heels because the leg slit breaks up the dress anyways so the length won’t look awkward.

Pretty and well-made! This dress is really pretty and feels and looks like good quality. I would suggest steaming it since it comes quite wrinkled but other than that it’s lovely! I chose a size XS and my measurements are: 32DD bust, 24 waist, 33 upper hips and 38 lower hips. I’m about 5 ft 3 and 110 pounds for reference. The dress doesn’t have a zipper so it was a bit tight to get on and off over my head. I appreciate that the straps are adjustable. The fabric is thick and not see-through at all. I like the tie detail in the back of the dress and the light blue color would suit all skin tones. Overall, it’s a great dress for a special occasion such as a wedding. I think silver accessories would work amazingly with the color of the dress. I like it a lot!

Made me feel beautiful This dress is seriously amazing. Buy it!! I did wear shapewear under it, but that combined with the flare made my mom tummy look normal! Sexy Little Dress This dress is sexy and has a lot going for it but I am going to have to agree with another reviewer who said that there is just a bit too much going on with this dress in the back. Honestly, the second/lower tie string is not necessary and I cut it off so that the back of the dress doesn't look like a complete jumble of strings. I also found the back strap, even when pulled as tight as possible is just too loose for me. So to make it fit and streamline the back, I plan to remove the loops for the tie string and place a pretty rhinestone button I have laying around. Otherwise, the rest of the dress fit well and it is very flattering. I love the color of this dress. The fabric is nice and it was easy to steam out the wrinkles within 5 minutes. The length and fit in the hips and waist is perfect for my small frame. I ordered the Small and I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 32B-25-34 for reference.

Get ready to steal the show! This dress is sexy, elegant, and head turning all at the same time. I bought it to wear to a wedding. For $30, the material is of high quality and hugs your curves in all the RIGHT places. I am a size 16 with 40DD boobs and thought I needed an XXL based on previous rvws. Glad I ordered an XL too (ty free Prime return shipping)! The XL fit my chest area more snug so I returned the XXL. I highly recommend a strapless bra and if needed, shapewear for an hourglass shape. The rubber on the sleeves will keep the sleeves in place for you so no worries about constantly needing to adjust them. I will caution you to have some 1 zip up the back for you by pulling the dress down then zipping up. The zipper is small and fragile like. Only downside is that I wish the zipper ended with a clasp at the top, but if you so choose you can sew one on yourself. Hope this review helped and I hope you enjoy this dress. I plan to wear it to many more events. ❤❤❤

My saving grace! BUY IT!! :) This dress is so beautiful and was my saving grace when the dress I originally planned on wearing to a wedding rehearsal ripped! I’m SO glad I brought this as a backup and honestly it ended up being more appropriate to the theme than the one I had planned on wearing anyway. It was the universe sending me a message to wear this all along! For reference, I bought a M in this dress and it was the PERFECT size. I’m a size 12/14 in Old Navy bottoms, a L in most tops & dresses, 38C bra size, & 5 feet 1 inches tall. The dress was a great length with 2 inch heels on, but it wouldn't have touched the floor if I wore flats instead. I would say size down 1 size for a more fitted look. The dress is stretchy at the waist, but nowhere else. I have a slight tummy, but it looked fine with shapewear. You can pull the dress all the way up and tie the back and front as close as possible if you’re like me and don't want to show armpit fat! If I were to change one thing, it would be to add cotton or something similar to the fabric to make it feel a bit more expensive, but the polyester looked fine and not cheap after I steamed the wrinkles out. Not a huge deal and the thinner material kept me perfectly cool in Florida without flashing anyone (not see through, at least the black isn’t). I will buy again!!!

The quality is much higher than I expected as well. I am 5'2", and the dress fell at a nice tea-length. I'm wearing a Medium in the photos and I'm usually a size 4 in dresses/pants. I have a more hour-glass figure with wider hips than shoulders, and the dress fit great everywhere except I do wish the band around the waist was just a ~TAD~ tighter. I felt the need to adjust a few times to pull the waist up to allow the top part to droop over and hide the band. You can see in the photos that the band/cinched waist is visible, and didn't stay hidden very well. However, if I sized down to a small, I don't think I would've liked the fit around my hips/chest/shoulders, so I would advise to stick to your normal sizing!

Beautiful color/pattern! Good fit & has pockets! This dress is so pretty! I stumbled upon this color as I wasn’t too in love with the other patterns. Material is soft and thin (yet durable in quality). Dress has a little bit of stretch. I have an interesting body type and measurements. I’m tall 5’9”, long legs and torso. Small chest, I wear small size in my tops, average waist (waist size is a large SM and a small M depends on fit) and also With Large berthing hips. As you can see I literally fall into every sizing category for each body area. finding stuff that works perfectly for me never happens, so I give somewhere. I followed the sizing measurements given (not Amazon’s measurements) and ordered a M for it to fit my arms/Shoulders better and for my waist measurement. However this dress doesn’t fit me at my waist because of my long torso it’s it’s a couple inches higher, but that typical. I don’t mind where it hits me, that’s where stuff usually hits me. The length of this dress is great! I’m wearing a Victoria secret bra that is padded and pushes me up (overall bra gives me an added cup size) which helps fill the bust area out nicer. And this dress has pockets! Really can’t say enough about this. I don’t think you’ll be disappointed.

Gorgeous, comfy (usually these do not go together) flattering dress This dress is so pretty. It is soft and like wearing a comfy nightgown but looks AMAZING on. PERFECT holiday dress. I wore this dress to a women's event and got a ton of compliments. I live in South FL and the dress is a medium knit that was not too thick for FL heat of outside but perfect for the chilly cold of the a/c at the event. I would imagine it would work the other way around for most of the USA. The fit is nice in the sense that it is a stretchy dress. I have recently lost weight and needed to wear spanx type under garments bc I wanted/needed everything to be smooth. The sleeves are the real show stopper of this dress. The lace is both MODEST but not frumpy. Same for the length of the skirt (Im 5'10") and the neckline too. While being modest, this dress is also pretty sexy looking. My hubby said "va va voomy!" If you are considering this dress for a holiday party, church/house of worship event, or a hot date, this is the PERFECT dress for you!!

Charming and fun to wear semi-formal or casual dress This dress is so pretty. The Rust is slightly more vivid orange than photos show. It’s a beautiful color and compliments my pale skin tone, which is not easy. But the top is a bit roomy for me. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34A, 27”Waist, 34”Hips and, other than the sort of baggy chest, the Small fits great. A good padded bra may remedy this, as I’m pretty flat in the chest department. I’d say this is definitely curve friendly. The pleated skirt flares out so gracefully and accentuates the hips in a good way. Unlike similar dresses, this has belt loops and comes with spare button for the cute keyhole back closure. Was not wrinkled on arrival and fabric is soft, silky, lightweight. No lining though. Super versatile. Can be paired with various shoes and accessories to suite any occasion from beach, casual, to formal. And so many colors to choose from. I may order one or two more, as this can be worn almost year round depending on color and outerwear. Very much recommend for any body type.

Charming and fun to wear semi-formal or casual dress This dress is so pretty. The Rust is slightly more vivid orange than photos show. It’s a beautiful color and compliments my pale skin tone, which is not easy. But the top is a bit roomy for me. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34A, 27”Waist, 34”Hips and, other than the sort of baggy chest, the Small fits great. A good padded bra may remedy this, as I’m pretty flat in the chest department. Simple and stunning! This dress is so simple but so stunning and elegant. It was very wrinkled when I got it. I ironed it with the steam option and it looked amazing! Very comfortable. Super soft and comfy This dress is so soft and comfortable, you could wear it all day long. I like the low slit. The sizing feels like it runs a tiny bit big. I would absolutely recommend this dress to others! Perfect for fall.

Super soft dress, length isn't the most flattering on me This dress is so soft and comfortable! It'll definitely keep you warm on a slightly chilly fall or winter night. The dress is pretty stretchy, so the XL fits just fine as expected based on the size chart. I don't know that I'd wear this dress to a holiday party because it kind of reads more victorian nightgown than festive to me. Maybe if it was a full length dress or knee length then it would look better on me, haha. I'm 5'4" and the dress hits me mid-calf. My husband mentioned that it could make a good Mother Gothel cosplay though. :)

This dress is really nice This dress is stunning on! The material is soft and is very flattering on everyone. If you have any areas of concern, a little shape wear under will help with that. Def wish they had an XS, but it's not super loose that it looks bad. I can easily wear this with heels and it's not dragging. Pros: can't beat the price, the quality is good so you'll def get a few uses out of it, it's ver flattering on and easy to get on without any assistance (important to me because I'll be traveling alone when I need to put it on and believe it or not so many dresses have zippers down the back and it's impossible to do alone) It also doesn't wrinkle that easy. It came out of the package pretty wrinkle free, a steamer will be all it needs. Cons: My only complaint is I ordered the purple and it isn't even close to purple. it's magenta. It's brighter than I would have preferred so I'm debating switching it out for a darker color. After looking at the listing it looks like they sent me the WRONG color. This looks like the solid rose color not purple even though my order clearly says purple.

Love this dress! This dress is stunning! I am 5'3", 130 lbs, 34b, and I ordered the small which fit perfect. Needs a little steaming out of the bag, but fits very well and is incredibly flattering. It is formal with a tiny bit old fashion style to it. Gorgeous dress.

Beautiful and Versatile This dress is stunning! My daughter’s Dad and I got married and I had her and my sister in the wedding. They both loved their dresses, however, the yellow is see through so make sure you wear something nude underneath. My sister found herself wishing she’d tried it on beforehand so she could’ve had spanx, but she held it out when she walked around and that seemed to hide that fact. We knew exactly how we wanted to tie them, but there are so many different ways to do so so they could be used over and over again. They are buttery soft too. You won’t be disappointed with this dress! My sister is about 5’5” and is around 140 lbs in a M and my daughter is about 5’4” and is just over 100 lbs in an XS and neither of them dragged too much. I believe they would still work for someone taller — I’m 5’8” and when I held the M up it appeared to be long enough.

2 words...Buy It!!! This dress is stunning. I received compliments ALL night. Notes to help with your purchse: I'm 5'6". Usually wear a 14. I ordered the large and it fit like a glove. I saw others complaining about sequin falling off. I lost a couple here and there but nothing major.

This dress is amazing!! This dress is stunning. The material is thick so it hold you in making it hard to see any kind of dimples. I received many compliments on my dress. I am 5’3 and weigh 135. this is a medium. It's a must have it looks very expensive and formal.

This dress is amazing!! This dress is stunning. The material is thick so it hold you in making it hard to see any kind of dimples. I received many compliments on my dress. I am 5’3 and weigh 135. this is a medium. It's a must have it looks very expensive and formal.

Very comfortable, body con evening dress! This dress is stylish and comfortable! It's super easy to get on due to the side zipper. The material is thick and could be worn with or without shape wear. It does not have breast padding, so you do need to wear a bra or some support in that area. In my photos, I'm wearing old school undies and a regular bra. You can see that it doesn't show much underneath, so that is a plus! This dress is so stretchy that I can do a complete squat, like I'm picking something up. It did move a little when over head reaching, so if you plan on dancing, maybe get some double sided tape to keep the off-shoulder on more securely. I'm 5'4 and this dress hits perfect evening length with no shoes. So, if you want to wear flats, you're all set! Honestly, I feel like this dress could be great for any age female looking to be comfy and nice! I was surprised at how dark the fabric appeared in color compared to the website. I ordered the teal and it was def a dark teal (maybe more of a winter color teal). The fabric also feels like it might be better in not as warm weather, but with the off-shoulder design, perhaps it's not super hot to wear. My current size is an 8. I ordered a medium. I wear a 34DD bra. My approximate measurements are 35, 28, 40. This would totally work if you are early pregnant because it's VERY stretchy. The ruffles give it a nice touch to distract from looking directly at the waist line too! Always a bonus if you eat, and get bloaty easily. I'm giving a four because the zipper shows "just a little" bit and was not super easy to zip around my curves. And also I was expecting just a little bit lighter color. Otherwise, 5 stars.

Pleasantly surprised! This dress is super pretty and really high quality - I was happily surprised! I bought this as a backup plan in case the Anthropologie dress I ordered for a wedding didn't work out and I am shocked to say this dress fits nicer and feels higher quality. The lining is soft and thick and the tulle is really pretty and cleanly detailed. I am 5'5" and typically wear a dress size 10- I bought a size 10 and the dress fits pretty well. There could be a little more fabric on the back panel at the top but I am a DD/DDD so for smaller busts it would likely be plenty of coverage. I love that the bodice is well structured so no need to worry about finding bra or shapewear to work with it. It is longer on me than on the model, more ankle/maxie than midi length.
Love it so much! This dress is super sexy! Love the way it fits. Keeps everything in place. Very comfortable to wear anywhere. Highly recommend! I weigh 165 and ordered a large fits perfect.

Cute and has potential, but do not size up This dress is super sparkly and has a good amount of stretch, which made sizing up a huge mistake. It has very forgiving folds and hides my stomach well, even without shapewear. Honestly, though, I really should have sized down. Im 5’7” and around 255-260lb, so usually I’m a 2x (18-20)/48D, but the 2x is huge. I kinda wanted something that had a little more support for the girls and clung tighter than what the 2xl provides. The top of the dress is also really large, which is the opposite of what usually happens with me. I’m ordering the xl and hopefully it’ll get here in time and fit better. Needed this for senior cap and gown pictures. If you want a looser fit go with your regular size, but if you want a tighter, more snatched look size down.

Love, Love, LOVE This Dress!! This dress is the bomb! As you can clearly see in my posted pictures! Lol. I purchased a medium as well as a large. With my recent 40lb weight gain, I wasn't to sure on which size. The large fit me comfortably, but it was too big in some areas like the breast (the top part flopped over) and the crotch area (Too baggy). The medium fits me like a glove! I Love, Love, LOVE this dress it is amazing! I received several compliments from men and women all night long! Lol. I got hit on, flirted with, etc. I am Not Single! Lol This dress is most definitely a head Turner! I was on the fence about purchasing, but it is the perfect little black dress to add to your closet! Okay, here are the deets, I'm 5 7" 194lbs, I usually wear a large, but in this case I'm glad I purchased the medium! The material does stretch but not too much, just enough to hug them curves! Lol. The arms weren't restricting and I didn't feel confined all night! I did wear a girdle just because of the curvature. If you're on the fence, I'd order. I'm glad I did! UPDATE: Came Back To Order Another In A Different Color For My Cruise!!

prettiest thing i own This dress is the prettiest thing ive ever bought. I bought this dress in April 2021 for my prom so it took me a while to make this review, back then it only had 5 reviews and it was a huge gamble but im so so happy it turned out the way it did. I got expedited shipping and it came when it said it would. I got a size 8 in long burgundy and it was a little too long and also a little big in the bust so i got it hemmed. I'm also a 34C bust for reference. Although i did size up because im a little on the taller side and better safe than sorry as this was my prom dress. The tulle on the elastic part of the sleeves was also itchy but easily fixed with some fabric tape or sewing in some silk ribbon. Overall, there isn't a single place where you can find a dress like this, let alone this cheap. I really wanted the dress from the original designer teuta matoshi however it was $800 compared to this one for $80. clear choice for me. This dress was so pretty and surprisingly comfy and a FANTASTIC deal. Amazon really came through. Attached are some pics of me at prom

Get the Dress This dress is true to size and has a slight stretch. I am 5 ft and 195 lbs the dress was floor length on me. Once I put on the heels it was perfect.

Nice material but maybe too long. This dress is true to size. I am 5’6, 184lbs, usually wear a medium, and ordered a medium. The material is a nice stretchy soft sweater-like knit and feels great on. It’s not tight and has a lot of freedom of movement. What I don’t like is that it makes my legs look shorter with where the slit is placed and how long the rest is. I’m average height for a female, and can’t imagine anyone shorter than me wearing this dress. There should be a petite option. I tried it with a belt I had on hand just to see if it helps give it a little more style, so forgive me for showing it off with the wrong type of belt and shoes. I plan to wear it with a black belt, black knee high boots, some jewelry, and a cute black jacket. Despite the dress having an awkward length, I believe wearing it with tall boots will offset that look. It’s a very comfortable dress and I would recommend it if you’re tall enough.

Elegant dress This dress is truly a masterpiece, exuding a remarkable sense of design. Its shimmering silk-like texture adds an extra touch of elegance. What sets it apart is not just its aesthetics but also its practicality. The material is incredibly soft and doesn't compromise on thickness or transparency. It's a relief to know that it can be easily cared for as it can be machine-washed by cold water without any special requirements. The only minor preparation it needs is a quick ironing upon arrival to ensure a flawless appearance. One of the standout features for me is the ingenious design that allows for independent dressing. Despite the presence of a zipper and buttons at the back, I can effortlessly slip into the dress without needing someone else's assistance. This level of convenience is not commonly found in other dresses, making it a standout choice. Moreover, the thoughtful design ensures that there are no concerns about any potential light exposure, even with the exposed left arm and shoulder. The dress strikes a perfect balance between revealing and modest, creating an alluring and sophisticated look. The accuracy of the sizing is commendable. As someone who typically wears either an S or M, I opted for the M size for this dress, and it fits me flawlessly. Considering my height of 5ft 6in, the length is just right, falling neither too long nor too short. It accentuates my figure beautifully and complements my overall appearance. In conclusion, the dress combining impeccable design, luxurious fabric, and practicality. Its versatility in terms of independent dressing, coupled with its comfortable fit and suitable length, make it a wardrobe staple for any fashion-forward individual.

Perfect wedding guest dress This dress is very high quality for the price! The color matched what I chose and the material exceeded my expectations. It was very comfortable and fit perfectly. Ordered a Medium, I am 5’10 180lbs. Usually I opt for a large with fitted items but this one I sized down and was happy with it. Ruching is very flattering.

Va Va Voom! This dress is very Jessica Rabbit, wowza! I am wearing a size small and I am 5’3, 135 lbs. My measurements are 36D-27-36 and the dress had a nice fitted look. It hugged all of my curves beautifully. It has a zipper on the lower half of the dress and then a button closure around the neck. It was very easy to do it all by yourself. I love everything about this dress, from the open back to the sweetheart cut in the front. It was very flattering and gorgeous all the way around. Another cool thing is that the slit can be worn high or low depending on your preference with just a pull of a zipper. I love that it isn’t that noticeable either. The ruching in the front really brings in your waistline, creating a curvier look to your body frame. It is long for my height but with some super high heels, I think I can manage. Plus I don’t mind a little bit of drag on the floor, gives the dress a more elegant look. The material is thick and well made and does not require a slip. I would recommend it.

Good quality for a great price This dress is very light and airy which is exactly what I need to attend an outdoor gala in the Florida Keys. I will probably wear flesh toned spanks or slip just in case the skirt is see-through and I've included a shot of the bust area so you can see that while I'm wearing a black strapless bra, I'm pretty sure my bra doesn't show through. My measurements were almost exactly the 18w and it fits exactly, there is no stretch where the ribbon meets at the zipper. It fit a little higher waisted than I expected but I have a tummy and that is hidden by the skirt which had plenty of room for my hips. I usually prefer a more slinky look but I've gained weight and decided to go more modest and comfortable. I am 5'3 and there was about 2 inches on the floor, I feel pretty confident my shoes will take care of that. All in all, I'm very happy with my purchase.

Very pretty dress! Although, an xsmall size would be nice!! This dress is very nice! I ordered it for my husband’s military Christmas party that was more formal so I would be able to breastfeed our son in it. The material and quality is great. And it has pockets! I ordered the “wine” dress in a small, and it was too big for me (see pictures for reference), so we altered it slightly in our hotel bathroom with a sewing kit from a dollar store (haha!). We are not expert seamstresses at all either but it turned out pretty good and just a little messed up but it was good for that night (I will either resew it myself or have someone else do it just so it isn’t weird- the white line in the last picture is the pin line I traced so it was more visible for this review). I was thinking it would be too big since I often wear an extra small, so if xsmall sizes could be made that would be awesome!! {For reference, I am about 5’5” and 108 pounds.}

A Dress for Success This dress is VERY nice. The fabric is light with just the right amount of stretch. The material isn’t scratchy or uncomfortable on the skin. The zip is hidden and glides easily. The length hits just right. Be careful with the tweed color; I’ve included a picture because I wasn’t expecting so many colors in the tweed. I did return the dress because I need an extra small and I didn’t like the tweed pattern. I’m 4’11” and 120lbs so this dress was a little too big on me around the bodice. I’ll certainly purchase if it ever comes in a smaller size. It’s a dress you want as a boss babe or just being super classy.

Very flowy, not too tight. Elegant. This dress is very unique once you are wearing it in person. The sleeves are completely detached from the body, not like a cape. They are very long strips of light fabric that are attractive but can be a tad annoying, too! The body of the dress is cut like a sheath dress but it's not tight or constrictive for the size imo. Of course, I'm pretty thin and I got a size small but I have wide hips for my size and it's still roomy. My measurements are around 33-25-36 and I had plenty of room to move through the chest, waist, and hips, almost too much but not so much so as to look dumpy. I am 5'5" and the hem hit me just at the knees. The skirt tapers but still has room for a decent stride to walk. The quality is good. The fabric and craftsmanship doesn't look or feel cheap. The body of the dress is not lined but the fabric isn't too thin so as to be see-through. I feel like this style is elegant and perfect for attending a wedding or the like. It strikes me as a tad matronly for some reason but I'm not sure why. It's tailored enough that I suppose I could pull off a more youthful look with it but idk.

Beautiful dress. This dress is very well made and the material is beautiful. It fit a tiny bit tighter than I expected but was still comfortable. I love the detailing under the bust and the side ruffle. The slit on the side is a little high but not indecent and would have been perfect for the semi formal wedding I bought it for. Sadly, I am just too short to pull off those sleeves. The ruffles are substantial and, I feel, they overwhelmed my frame. I am 5 ft tall and 154 lbs. If the sleeves were different, perhaps smaller ruffles, I'd keep the dress, but I'm going to send it back just because it does not suit my body. On a taller and, or thinner person, this is a stunning dress. Would recommend.

GORGEOUS, well-made, and got a TON of compliments! This dress is VERY well made. It is sheer but has a lining underneath which hides things (you can't see pantylines). If you are larger chested (I'm a B), you may need some support if they aren't perky. Otherwise the "off shoulder" part stayed put the whole time. I am super short (5 foot tall) so I had to have a tailor take about 5 inches off the bottom. I wore 4 inch heels for the "non sand" pic, and was barefoot in the other. The slit up the leg is perfect, too; it doesn't go too high or show too much leg; there is a LOT of flowy fabric. This dress would be PERFECT for a bridesmaid -- or even -- a bride! It can be dressed up with heels and jewelry (or a veil or flowers in the hair, etc.) or dressed down (no shoes, hair wild, etc. Just perfect and so gorgeous!

Great Dress, Very Versatile This dress is wonderful. I needed a black dress for a funeral and bought this one after reading all the reviews. Perfect Dress This dress is worth bragging about! I received endless compliments and I highly recommend it. I would definitely buy it in another color for another occasion. It was also extremely flattering to my figure and slimming on my little belly. Additionally, it can be both small and big boob friendly depending on the look you’re going for. I opted to not wear a bra, (having smaller boobs myself), although it can be sticky bra friendly if need be and definitely show cleavage with bigger boobs if you were going for a more mature and sexy look. I also loved the slit on the leg. Definitely buy this dress!!
